**Whatever happened to Tupperware?** Tupperware was never just a food container. For a few decades after World War II, it was practically a symbol of American life. The company emerged in the late 1940s, when inventor Earl Tupper developed lightweight plastic containers with airtight "burping" seals that felt futuristic in an age still dominated by glass jars and wax paper. The products were genuinely impressive by the standards of the day: durable, lightweight, leak-resistant, and far better at preserving food than many existing storage options. But the real breakthrough came from Brownie Wise, a charismatic saleswoman who realized the product worked best not on store shelves, but in living rooms, and the Tupperware party was born. [Here's a TV commercial for one](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssvnEGhkpVtnRppbYTwnCxqYiJzE1Q3r5KX6HrOdJv-H-e3dnnkrflzV_AYqpug94KIMLukm8IDZe99rwtIWOGdmstVccp1weqDsy46HN5ODlEmwA4iAEsM-ZIGRfH47Ba41WKs1ZBBdCUUQA6a28kgAKpp3nI9qlRxQyjVItpTFwqM0WZgtBTVIxICjFj3cefmjdcIZVHvcM-hnoZil0Rr42IF8JPhJ967-Oj3vA2w_N_Lh7DSsTpTsTr-4cD-nX-FlMfdhuvPZeSmzZE0uXic_kj8V8d7pb_BgAA___Kc3HJ). From the 1950s through the 1980s, Tupperware parties were a cultural phenomenon--part social event, part shopping spree, part escape from household routine. Women would gather on Tuesday evenings, admiring the latest designs: [the iconic Wonderlier bowls](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUr2S2yAQfhrc2QO74q9QkRuNu0ubUoPFSuIOCQVxVpynz4jUqdLtfn98DPx4799diGGdvruF2jKmfqVjj1QK5X50e6G9TDkdYZ2GUALtX_s-ph44qCuXV6F770J89c3FtyMREF6oFVpbLgCtvcxtw8GT1LLh5Lwl5yV3DVlq3MNwC-4S2jONS6EF5wrNbYRGauObcUBlvBSs4eRDSfn2kcJaZhrjKz0p34a0XGI7l7LtDL8xuDO4H8dxc4v7ndaTZnDfGd4_GXZHWj3lGCgzeHukI-4M3srXtlE-XCYGyvkpb8Ez7ISxAoXUWivLQM1P5yuutZVGaq5R6op7ejLshjrTry2uDDtet5iGbX4x7CwHY6ys4ErlYNhNdUlD-KipEoUAFMZaoY3gaFVzvVbJz6Uw7KjO2a3_EFe6uDzVtM_DXxFBolBc6b8Hv7zzQz4vdup7gSjBNLw3Vp5tl6E6OYLVFrmgx4CCG4MODY3QKGW9E8BAFTed_VOa5pfPVzjdmUaG3eb7PfYQH9uwzDGpni659dsRYgy70qzh0-JCrG9W_uujPVv4EwAA__8p_dW5), the Jel-Ring mold for fancy Jell-O, the Cake Taker that every mom coveted. In an era of expanding suburbs and isolated homemakers, the parties offered something bigger than kitchenware. They created community, status, and, for many women, a rare chance at independent income. Tupperware became a cultural institution because it perfectly matched postwar America: optimistic, consumer-driven, convenience-obsessed, and fascinated by plastic as the material of the future. But the culture that sustained Tupperware slowly disappeared. As more women entered the workforce, daytime home parties faded. Big-box retail and later e-commerce made direct sales feel unnecessary. Cheap competitors flooded the market. Plastic itself lost its glamorous image and became associated with waste and pollution. By the 2020s, Tupperware had become more of a nostalgia brand than a cultural force. The company filed for bankruptcy protection in 2024 before reorganizing under new ownership as "The New Tupperware Co." Today, it is trying to reinvent itself as a leaner digital-era brand, selling products online and through its remaining network of independent consultants in selected global markets. Still, the brand left a remarkable imprint on American culture. Today, those vintage pastel bowls [are collector's items on eBay](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykk81u4zYQx5-Gvtkghx-SDj7YVowE2yyaoNhs9yLQJCXTokSBZEw4T19IdlH00ktv_M9gZn7zwY_X5lVaZ8fuuxzMNrW-GU2OzqRkQtPKmExMXfDZjp2yyZr4GWPrG8Ag1pivSdFoad2tYSu9bY0BQ1dmS4qiwgRoVa3O2wqbEym5wEK3p1NZiKrinKvWSA4GGF7Z7ZwNc1IQjAUtNy0wXpSatYqKUnOCGDbaJh82F2_HdDatu_mrCRvlh5XbnlOaIqI7BEcEx5zzxpzkbXYiOEZ1RnC0m3MaHKLHZuwzovXVjkl2BsE-fU6TCVmGWSAQTZRKJkRrPIs2-AHR-p0tKoU-Wo1oPQGljAPbDLzAG0cooQhEJ3UT_WdQBtGaIBDOK0TrCkNZVhyBGPp0m2YnAhFtMm7s72Ly9v5Qw9SNc3RZVKQSBYY5T3BRJhk6M3PpKNfACK8Yp7wiVTlXNr5ZwBCI0aTsw5y4W0pGtXgIhgeiksMkbTfezf8q1Cm3WA-X_O2wu2T-6-fb_rzXTzbvXvjPHx_qcnl-G-Iz_I6n9RP_1R8bPf1Je_7xrF5-fDsc3t4Vfe92bl19ifD63V--6nd_-O2jfNtd62afnxamO9IM1Hj9XwvJftQmOGsCgv3JZxcR7EeT5z59mG_gMerXP5qX-j4AqScf_352wX9O904ZCEYqXFImZgiZ1PmfdciTenkMsDe37MNDDH1YogtC1oRTURRrygTDZM3mdQU3IVoLTgAzzAkvoEEgtLna5QjUKmz1lK1zNooCMdwN0rrlbNP_-mvXLfwVAAD__3NTJ5A). The parties are gone, but somewhere in your kitchen, there's probably still a butter-yellow Tupperware container--lid missing, of course--that refuses to die. _Were you a fan of Tupperware, or did you ever attend a Tupperware party? () | Whatever happened to Tupperware? Tupperware was never just a food container. For a few decades after World War II, it was practically a symbol of American life. The company emerged in the late 1940s, when inventor Earl Tupper developed lightweight plastic containers with airtight "burping" seals that felt futuristic in an age still dominated by glass jars and wax paper. The products were genuinely impressive by the standards of the day: durable, lightweight, leak-resistant, and far better at preserving food than many existing storage options. But the real breakthrough came from Brownie Wise, a charismatic saleswoman who realized the product worked best not on store shelves, but in living rooms, and the Tupperware party was born. . From the 1950s through the 1980s, Tupperware parties were a cultural phenomenon--part social event, part shopping spree, part escape from household routine. Women would gather on Tuesday evenings, admiring the latest designs: , the Jel-Ring mold for fancy Jell-O, the Cake Taker that every mom coveted. In an era of expanding suburbs and isolated homemakers, the parties offered something bigger than kitchenware. They created community, status, and, for many women, a rare chance at independent income. Tupperware became a cultural institution because it perfectly matched postwar America: optimistic, consumer-driven, convenience-obsessed, and fascinated by plastic as the material of the future. But the culture that sustained Tupperware slowly disappeared. As more women entered the workforce, daytime home parties faded. Big-box retail and later e-commerce made direct sales feel unnecessary. Cheap competitors flooded the market. Plastic itself lost its glamorous image and became associated with waste and pollution. By the 2020s, Tupperware had become more of a nostalgia brand than a cultural force. The company filed for bankruptcy protection in 2024 before reorganizing under new ownership as "The New Tupperware Co." Today, it is trying to reinvent itself as a leaner digital-era brand, selling products online and through its remaining network of independent consultants in selected global markets. Still, the brand left a remarkable imprint on American culture. Today, those vintage pastel bowls . The parties are gone, but somewhere in your kitchen, there's probably still a butter-yellow Tupperware container--lid missing, of course--that refuses to die. Were you a fan of Tupperware, or did you ever attend a Tupperware party? body:
We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
| | Friend,
---
I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground.

Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
_Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona_
---
These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them.

They're already claimed. And we don't have extras.

By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in.

Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it.

That's where things stand right now.

We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment.

And I don't say that lightly.

Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down.

The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great.

And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing.

Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back.

**We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. **

For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there.

And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens.

And it's not isolated growth anymore.

**We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. **

But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America.

That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation...

And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak.

So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build.

What's different now is the pace.

**Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: **

✅ Arkansas
✅ Florida
✅ Idaho
✅ Indiana
✅ Montana
✅ Nebraska
✅ Oklahoma
✅ South Carolina
✅ Texas
✅ Tennessee

That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action.
---

clean_body: We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment. | | | | | Friend, I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground. Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible. Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them. They're already claimed. And we don't have extras. By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in. Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it. That's where things stand right now. We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment. And I don't say that lightly. Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down. The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great. And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing. Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back. We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there. And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet. That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens. And it's not isolated growth anymore. We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America. That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation... And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak. So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build. What's different now is the pace. Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: ✅ Arkansas ✅ Florida ✅ Idaho ✅ Indiana ✅ Montana ✅ Nebraska ✅ Oklahoma ✅ South Carolina ✅ Texas ✅ Tennessee That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action. That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly. It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up. Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through. And right now, that's where we're stretched. We're not lacking interest or momentum. We're working to keep up with both. So here 's how you can help... Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it. An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: ✅ Constitutions. ✅ Chapter guides. ✅ Flags. ✅ Materials to organize and lead. It turns a student who wants to speak up... into one who actually does. And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here." Every activism kit you help sponsor means one more student is ready to lead instead of sitting on the sidelines. That's how we keep saying "yes" when the next student steps forward. That's how this movement actually scales. Because the reality is, the demand is here now. The only question is whether we're equipped to meet it. And that comes down to whether people like you decide to step in and help carry this forward. One final thing: I also wanted to say thank you. If you've supported Turning Point USA before -- whether once or many times -- you've already played a role in building what you're seeing right now. Students finding their voice. More state partnerships. New TPUSA chapters like the one at Charlie's former high school. This kind of momentum doesn't happen without people willing to stand behind it. And we don't take that lightly. I appreciate you taking the time to read this, and for everything you've already done to support this work. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. Friend, what you're seeing right now is something we've been working toward for years -- a generation of young Americans who are no longer willing to sit quietly while the Left dominates their schools and culture. But moments like this don't sustain themselves. If we don't keep up, we lose ground. It's that simple. We need to keep pace with the growth happening right now -- to fund more activism kits, support more chapters, and make sure no student is left standing alone after they decide to speak up. subject: They told my parents five things. Every one of them was false.

My name is Chloe Cole. Before I tell you my story, I want to read you the lies. One by one. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK6cRZ_Cpx1KR2Tl8WZaZqJZm84sfmTTGrsfF7KgJB9srVM3z_wNyopACD8dJuKnYb7GtqYa5c-6gWMoNbmm-0ANbJ8gE2akWHRBS2j0rA

Patriot,

Before I tell you my story, I want to read you the lies.

Not my opinion about what happened to me.

Not my interpretation.

The specific, verifiable, documented lies that were told — to my parents, to me, and to the public — by the doctors and institutions that built a medical industry out of treating children like me.

I know these lies intimately.

Not because I read about them in a study. Not because someone told me they existed.

Because every single one of them was told to me.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK6cRZ_DwRhLevIfyEQ55cDEFfkW2cxBL8MW6c7NI65sbfi6Zh04JpbigbKby1ysKlcnYqMT4trTdVIgj7n0zgmRmz7wYZh0bwTa1oL9ZQ
Deliver the Verdict

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK6cRZ_EohRXhhpUIT6WsW-DXEvTUrIQS-OUZVjgE0IqTrTW8T2FmksIK7YpEcaqPejFxOeRtiKbtM1Xi3MFeXzC3K7E93CjzVK5JSUvvw

My name is Chloe Cole. I am a detransitioner. I am 21 years old. And on April 5, 2027, I am taking Kaiser Foundation Hospitals to trial.

Here is the case.

LIE #1: "Your child will attempt suicide without immediate medical intervention."

I was 12 years old when a gender specialist looked at my parents and said that if they didn't put me on a medical path, I would be at risk of suicide.

I was not suicidal.

I was a confused girl who had started puberty early, didn't fit in with the girls in her class, and didn't know why she felt so out of place. I was struggling. I was not in crisis.

The suicide threat was the mechanism. It was the tool used to override my parents' hesitation, override the time they needed to think, override every instinct that told them to slow down.

It was a lie told to frightened parents by a credentialed professional in a clinical setting.

And it worked.

LIE #2: "This treatment is reversible. You can always stop."

At 13, I began testosterone injections.

I will likely have medical complications for the rest of my life. The body that was mine before I was old enough to understand what I was doing is now gone.

My fertility is still unknown.

There was no reversibility. There never was.

The word "reversible" was used to deceive and hide the truth about an irreversible medical intervention on a child.

That is not medicine. That is a lie with a syringe behind it.

LIE #3: "Surgery is the appropriate next step for a patient at this stage."

At 15, a surgeon at a Kaiser Foundation Hospital facility removed my breasts.

I was a child. I didn't understand what breastfeeding was. I didn't understand what that part of my future meant. I didn't understand what nerve damage was, or that it was a documented and expected outcome of the procedure.

No one at that facility stopped to ask whether I might change my mind. No one slowed down. It was just assumed that I was actually a boy born in the “wrong body.”

The tissue removed in that operating room does not grow back. There is no reversal.

The skin grafts from my surgery failed two years later. I was 17. I still manage the complications today.

The doctors who performed that surgery have not once reached out to help.

They called it appropriate care. I call it what it was.

LIE #4: "Children who are affirmed have better mental health outcomes."

At 16 — after the testosterone injections, after the surgery, after clinical language and the assurances — I became suicidal for the first time.

The nightmare the doctors told my parents they were preventing?

They caused it.

I am not a statistic. I am a person. But I am also not alone. Detransitioners across this country describe the same sequence: the assurances, the interventions, the moment of realization, and then the crash that the clinics never prepared them for — and never took responsibility for.

The studies the gender industry cites to support "affirmation" are now being retracted, revised, and challenged in courts and legislatures across the world.

The evidence was always weaker than the language was confident.

LIE #5: "This was the patient's choice."

A child cannot consent to a procedure she does not understand, after a process designed to ensure she would agree, following years of medical and social conditioning that made any other outcome feel like death.

I was coerced. They put my parents under duress. Now what happened to me is a question for a jury.

On April 5, 2027, that jury will convene.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK6cRZ_FCAgWkFzkUo1crM24CZtVIS8xe7wZcvo8yqi9cv8QcoaFuZn3S7kmuUHqrUSq-8WwVgkBXvLdfbZqn8hBZ56mJab0kdt5YdaECQ

Patriot, I've given you the case.

Five lies. Told to a child and her parents by credentialed professionals inside a licensed American hospital.

Told in a language designed to sound like medicine.

Documented in records that will be entered into evidence.

On April 5, 2027, twelve Americans will sit in a California courtroom and hear all of it.

They will hear what doctors did to me. What the doctors said. And what real medical experts think about my doctors’ “treatment” of me.

They will deliver a verdict.

You are the reason that case is funded.

You are the reason the lawyers are prepared.

You are the reason the witnesses are ready.

You are the reason those twelve people get to hear the truth.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK6cRZ_GemQwDePXJItWSrYpl6jMgmsz9bWED8PKsoa0dEZz46EorwRib0Pjgm32ZK-Wd744ZeEGSaqfuP6nDdBKvJpnlH8G2drCwuP0dQ
Deliver the Verdict

The lies have been read into the record.

Now it's time to deliver the verdict.

Chloe Cole

On behalf of the Center for American Liberty

P.S. April 5, 2027. My trial against Kaiser Foundation Hospitals. They tried everything to keep these lies out of a courtroom — arbitration, sealed records, delays. The courts said no. The first detransitioner malpractice jury already sided with a young woman just like me. Now I need to walk in on April 5 with the strongest team possible. Your $100 today goes straight into funding the fight. The lies are on record. Help me get them in front of a jury.

clean_body: View in browser A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler. My name is Chloe Cole. Before I tell you my story, I want to read you the lies. One by one. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Patriot, Before I tell you my story, I want to read you the lies. Not my opinion about what happened to me. Not my interpretation. The specific, verifiable, documented lies that were told — to my parents, to me, and to the public — by the doctors and institutions that built a medical industry out of treating children like me. I know these lies intimately. Not because I read about them in a study. Not because someone told me they existed. Because every single one of them was told to me. Deliver the Verdict My name is Chloe Cole. I am a detransitioner. I am 21 years old. And on April 5, 2027, I am taking Kaiser Foundation Hospitals to trial. Here is the case. LIE #1: "Your child will attempt suicide without immediate medical intervention." I was 12 years old when a gender specialist looked at my parents and said that if they didn't put me on a medical path, I would be at risk of suicide. I was not suicidal. I was a confused girl who had started puberty early, didn't fit in with the girls in her class, and didn't know why she felt so out of place. I was struggling. I was not in crisis. The suicide threat was the mechanism. It was the tool used to override my parents' hesitation, override the time they needed to think, override every instinct that told them to slow down. It was a lie told to frightened parents by a credentialed professional in a clinical setting. And it worked. LIE #2: "This treatment is reversible. You can always stop." At 13, I began testosterone injections. I will likely have medical complications for the rest of my life. The body that was mine before I was old enough to understand what I was doing is now gone. My fertility is still unknown. There was no reversibility. There never was. The word "reversible" was used to deceive and hide the truth about an irreversible medical intervention on a child. That is not medicine. That is a lie with a syringe behind it. LIE #3: "Surgery is the appropriate next step for a patient at this stage." At 15, a surgeon at a Kaiser Foundation Hospital facility removed my breasts. I was a child. I didn't understand what breastfeeding was. I didn't understand what that part of my future meant. I didn't understand what nerve damage was, or that it was a documented and expected outcome of the procedure. No one at that facility stopped to ask whether I might change my mind. No one slowed down. It was just assumed that I was actually a boy born in the “wrong body.” The tissue removed in that operating room does not grow back. There is no reversal. The skin grafts from my surgery failed two years later. I was 17. I still manage the complications today. The doctors who performed that surgery have not once reached out to help. They called it appropriate care. I call it what it was. LIE #4: "Children who are affirmed have better mental health outcomes." At 16 — after the testosterone injections, after the surgery, after clinical language and the assurances — I became suicidal for the first time. The nightmare the doctors told my parents they were preventing? They caused it. I am not a statistic. I am a person. But I am also not alone. Detransitioners across this country describe the same sequence: the assurances, the interventions, the moment of realization, and then the crash that the clinics never prepared them for — and never took responsibility for. The studies the gender industry cites to support "affirmation" are now being retracted, revised, and challenged in courts and legislatures across the world. The evidence was always weaker than the language was confident. LIE #5: "This was the patient's choice." A child cannot consent to a procedure she does not understand, after a process designed to ensure she would agree, following years of medical and social conditioning that made any other outcome feel like death. I was coerced. They put my parents under duress. Now what happened to me is a question for a jury. On April 5, 2027, that jury will convene. Patriot, I've given you the case. Five lies. Told to a child and her parents by credentialed professionals inside a licensed American hospital. Told in a language designed to sound like medicine. Documented in records that will be entered into evidence. On April 5, 2027, twelve Americans will sit in a California courtroom and hear all of it. They will hear what doctors did to me. What the doctors said. And what real medical experts think about my doctors’ “treatment” of me. They will deliver a verdict. You are the reason that case is funded. You are the reason the lawyers are prepared. You are the reason the witnesses are ready. You are the reason those twelve people get to hear the truth. Deliver the Verdict The lies have been read into the record. Now it's time to deliver the verdict. Chloe Cole On behalf of the Center for American Liberty P.S. April 5, 2027. My trial against Kaiser Foundation Hospitals. They tried everything to keep these lies out of a courtroom — arbitration, sealed records, delays. The courts said no. The first detransitioner malpractice jury already sided with a young woman just like me. Now I need to walk in on April 5 with the strongest team possible. Your $100 today goes straight into funding the fight. The lies are on record. Help me get them in front of a jury. Deliver the Verdict The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. Your gift is tax-deductible. Center for American Liberty PO Box 200942 Pittsburgh, PA 15251-0942

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Spurs Advance, Jarrell Recognized, and Peach Crop in Doubt
body:
Wildfires rip through Panhandle canyon country. Feds drop $1.7B on Big Bend border wall construction. The Spurs punch their ticket to the Western Conference Finals. It's all in today's Texas Flyover.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2O2zAQhJ-G6mjwRxKtQkUAQ92lTUmsybXEhD8CubLu3j7wXZAXuHJ3BvNhML_e7BuEGPL6ExLO9P4oNuPZIhJhtW0_agP_hOzwN9SKMVZ0Zc1WCTVyMXBprIcQP2zf-fku_CQ7nKUxk5CD6UW3zcPjalDi1I-Dvg-id77XalBCOKlhlLIL8ytMDNJIKZScLsZcFfh-8FfnNU7AeoE-UKkX2pDwHdojfpQn1osrqYvzRrQ3pn8wtTC1nOd5KSmHrRDG9rIwtXwdTC1wNAqZ36FSydxVxD9MLbSFvDZOhfvC1NKOlLAyvRyUbCtHdcj07ZNs_6GZGl9iQh-OxPTtDjn__zpIO4Q1M32DEypmbI3D0WojHjG0oyL_YtiQLW1otxBj6-rs9zPEGNpoWC_WBCF-dqTvLfOc1d8AAAD__-wJqQs) | |
# Sunday, May 17, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1839, Texas Rangers [defeated](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUxvGnwU7ngJqjBcVt7HLbLZ0DnCg7BDLAxvj2O8krbPWvvl_xfV3XK_ng4_af7qzr65bWyEcJXCvntTx-ciH3pGj5m3LmEDLbtMVVgbq0MLYSV0c-nOvQOG3AzbJhLRFnkCMO0Ox6xB7AWod2Ugpmc7FseupxMtxPs8HG6zcGo0QpQcm5Q5wUuWF0k3U9zyQGYOdryl3dufKLyi2c6cm5s-neBL3X-iii_yfUItRyHEdXy04pBh-5S3kTavmsWkdna853hFo41vyunIYma_c4fAi-XFAMsN3Jhw9e_3bJU6vfAAAA___ovnX4) Mexican insurgent Manuel Flores and his band near the North San Gabriel River. Following the skirmish, documents were discovered that appeared to implicate the Cherokees in a plot to overthrow Texas. President Mirabeau B. Lamar’s subsequent demand for the tribe to leave the Republic instigated the Cherokee War. A Texas town ranks No. 4 on a new list of America's fastest-growing up-and-coming communities.****[See today’s _Around Texas_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOpC9sXEoXFxDl2uvRIu9CT4ZG9mbEN7-lOje4O-mGM3o-_7c5huGGNLjN25k-X3Pc6KjRmKmMtf9WSr6FyZHf7EUirGQy480g4ChE7qTZvYY4jmr1ttF-FG2ZKUxo5DaKNGudlwAnBv0IkcSbhi8RiK80mVR0hul22A_Y0JLI6UAOfbGXAG90v7q_IVGbJQgHziXnldiemO9xzO_qPQub220K_Nem8uvBqYGpuM4-u2smDBxTiF_Sg1MMdyp8hmpgQkLB_dN_6E6fnd73p8ROeTUAYBWg9H9vu5tsX4_QoyhDqZR4rFhiN9j_pmul4V_AQAA__8dbYDa) section to find out which city earned the ranking. In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , Ayla Brown shared three simple habits researchers say may help keep your brain sharp as you age. Scientists believe small everyday choices could play a bigger role in long-term cognitive health than many people realize. [Listen here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz01uqzAQAODTmF2Qx8YZvPDiSU-smu6qLq0JMxBXDkTG-eH2VXuFXuCTvs9TPFHKaZnf6SqhvqY1LvLcstQqJW63e9mIH7SM8kWlSM5FxnVeotHmeNDuABiZUt5j13A4a_bQSABEr8Fhp5tLQGZwTP00eSKvOyfiejgaJGvQWGhS-MG0AwTQBnyL2BviznE_shVPqtPCqa6lrRep8qJtyvv6kNKO67XJ4VLrbVP2nzKDMsO-3uu9PYsyw8frLKN_G-LcKztUZf9bwKYEvj1Tzmk7our0fKWUf6X6t_8jmO8AAAD__7jQbcM). Today’s sponsor, [The Omni at Barton Creek Resort & Spa](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2O2zAQhJ-G6mjwRxKtQkUAQ92lTUmsybXEhD8CubLu3j7wXZAXuHJ3BvNhML_e7BuEGPL6ExLO9P4oNuPZIhJhtW0_agP_hOzwN9SKMVZ0Zc1WCTVyMXBprIcQP2zf-fku_CQ7nKUxk5CD6UW3zcPjalDi1I-Dvg-id77XalBCOKlhlLIL8ytMDNJIKZScLsZcFfh-8FfnNU7AeoE-UKkX2pDwHdojfpQn1osrqYvzRrQ3pn8wtTC1nOd5KSmHrRDG9rIwtXwdTC1wNAqZ36FSydxVxD9MLbSFvDZOhfvC1NKOlLAyvRyUbCtHdcj07ZNs_6GZGl9iQh-OxPTtDjn__zpIO4Q1M32DEypmbI3D0WojHjG0oyL_YtiQLW1otxBj6-rs9zPEGNpoWC_WBCF-dqTvLfOc1d8AAAD__-wJqQs), is inviting guests to experience unforgettable summer weekends in the Texas Hill Country with live music, luxury accommodations, family-friendly activities, and exclusive seasonal events just outside Austin.

## Mother Faces Charges
A 34-year-old Texas mother has been [charged with capital murder](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUL2SpCAYfBrMsOATBw0ILiGbSy-0PuVz5JYBCxidefst9xU26aC7qv_-3ac7-uDj4y8-ydT3mqZIZwlUK-Wp7K9c0B0YF_qPOVMImZb0iBMIuHHRc6knhz58JtU4Mws3yoaM1HoUstdKNJuhYQQ1zHO_qhGwm4du6NZRrGrthvnWU-PNZSZ6qaUUIMdW6wHQqd4Ni-toRKYEOV9TbutGld5Y1vBJB-V2Sc8mmK3WvbDuDwPLwJ7n2X4VrJfIwF5rGNiQFgwM7BXFwIqegZUXAF_TKzruCB33kc-vHMnxgza_BOIp8pNK5cU74gUjx1hT9InvKfjloj4MbJON208fgi83zZR4PNGHn3b1d58eBr4DAAD___cWisk) after her two children were found dead inside a burned vehicle on Friday on San Antonio's West Side. Marlene Vidal of Edinburg was detained behind a warehouse where a passerby spotted [a white Hyundai on fire](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb0RAINgDQxdv6drRejaPmOoFLCBO8veVq_5B16ure4_O13W6QqSYbp9wR9deIU8Jn5WwNSxT3R6lgt8hLfgNpSBRwSXf0qSEunBhuLSTh0jvSXfezcIPskMnrR2ENFaLbnXCm9CjmHsN2sx9OKMJth-0tUIHFaCL7hgTRlophZLDydpegdfG94s_4wBMC_Sx5XJqKzZ8QQ30zjuW05LvHbm1ta2y8wdTI1Pjga8rJEgtp5iPzl_K1Eh5AWJqbM_MPYLnG-aNkMfEgc-PktDzHde4EHbF-e0ZiWK9WKbF7Q6Rfh_b_zztTv0EAAD__1FUfms) around 5 a.m. The victims were her 7-year-old daughter and 5-year-old son. Statements from Vidal, surveillance video, and scene evidence show she acted alone, police said, adding [mental health](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL-G6tYgeZRoFSrSqLu0KYU1d2UxoEhjRYt3fx_YyB9cOwM8zLw_n8snxhTz_TfuPNWvtSyZ25G4VpbleDzlQDoxB_6LIpyScCj3vFhtB9A9GL8QxvS9uI6mm6bRdDwZ70dteu90t03OrF73rsfgedR6Ze-HwQ046N4Gr29dnF4w3RtvjLZmvHh_tUiup2ugDx5ROc0Ua5FL3bjyFx5r-i4nyyWUvUvTVuvjUB-_lJ2VnVtrl3wLtLZXrez8-qPsnErApOz8BsD_cC91Y4GwodyZoMW6QcBHrJhgfwqxAK6VBWorELaYSDhDY2FYyzMTECNBzIBwe0pmgpO3GBIrOztt3XD1ys6dTPRoMaV4DF45fd8xpvf4-jPl52T_BQAA__8Xp5eN) may have played a role. She has no prior record. Vidal is being held on a $2.1 million bond as investigators work to determine the fire's cause.
## Feds Award Big Bend Wall Deal
The federal [government awarded a $1.7 billion](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnsTcsIHYIA0MXb-na0frh_-1QEbCAhOTtK7eP0P3T6e6-rssVfPBx-4Q7mfpa0xKplUC1Ul7K_sgF8AnR0TfkTCFkcmmLi-TyzPjEhFoQfHgvY4_GctSiJyOU0lxMauT9zawjP-GFa3DciUmMk5bc2rObuFZ2tbr35gjjk1BCcCn0oNRFAo4TXhyeSEM3ckJfUx7qjSq9oKzhnZ6UB5fufTC3WvfSnT46OXdybq0Na3opeJTq40E6OR-bOjlbvzFLEZlNGSmzBiEwwRSzPgSfIoMGGQkZUtl9JRbTn3F2Z3uAWPpscG-HLmfVjXy7gw-_Per_3nsa-RMAAP__FaqF8Q) border wall contract in the Big Bend region one week after Customs and Border Protection (CBP) Commissioner Rodney Scott said no wall would be built in Big Bend National Park. The contract, listed for border barrier construction along a stretch of the Rio Grande in far West Texas, caught many by surprise, given the agency's recent assurances. Conservation groups and local residents pushed back immediately, citing the area's ecological significance and cultural heritage. On Thursday, DHS [waived dozens of federal environmental laws](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ8GOke2MTgULq6hy7VXojW7IU42Bq2dv7c_5XuFrx5pRpp_p_kEiVNe_8KdQn2ftznTqzDVSjKX_SEF8Al5oSuIELPQsq15ttoOSvfK-Bkh8Wd2LYaocTQtBeP9qE3vnW4vYTRad52LwzHq6C2MfbTOWU_nOHjo-jaFr0z3xhujrRkP3h8toOvxuGBHIzROE6a6yaFeqNIbypk_25PksGz3lsOl1r003Z_GTo2dVgK5PvIt0Rc3dtpBbkVBRrU_IqdFMWQsjZ3iJkiiXsCsYlpVpIxK0qZWgYzUSsD9lZhTGXzj9HqHxD_J-rtRz2D_BwAA__8uHH5C) to fast-track construction--including the Endangered Species Act, the Clean Water Act, and the Clean Air Act--following a notice first reported by Marfa Public Radio. State officials and West Texas advocates are demanding [answers on the scope](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpSAQhZ8GMyxAFA0INjGbTTe0Gmi97CJYgNeZt99iXmGy_qlzvj7952P7AB98PH7Dibp-7mmL-JSAtWLeynXnAu4N0eJfyBlDyGjTETfBxETZSLnaHPjwtcnOacPcwjvUXKmF8VFJ1r30KNiAVg58krNhUhkzLyAWC2ZUE8il87qZsZErzpngS6_ULMDJ0c3WDbgAkQydryn39YUVP6Hs4Su9Mfc2nV3Qr1qvQoZfRKxErM_z9P8K1LYkYm1piFi_ZUSsDUXEykYiVt4qrqjxIfgUqU2xZrCVwgPZoaN7ytSk7DDTB0KgPlLjD2owOgqnd_S6TfC2Cfe7NIt2VWtLzbetbXIFiA3cZe2up5HKpIhkxwk-fAeoP3v7W4v_AQAA__8TuJhX) of the project, including whether barriers would encroach on the national park itself.
## Spurs Heading to Western Conference Finals
The San Antonio Spurs eliminated the Minnesota Timberwolves with a [Game 6 blowout](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSpCAYBOCnwQwLflE0ILjEbC690EL4dbhFsICRmbffcl9h46-qq7v_PZaHdt6F_a8-UJX3FpeANXssBdOSz1fK2l46GPyvU0LvE5q4hwUYDJT1lMvFauc_i2isWpmdeIOKSzkx3kvBmqcS3YAAho2mk72YuBSrhA75ujE2rMPUOHWHsZ5LzhnwqZVyBG1Fb0djO5w0EQytKzG15YkF3zpv_hMvTK2JR-PVs5Qzk-4PgZnAXGttMZ_hRgJzWDWBOZeYPgTmhcDsLIFZjHLsJi5vu0fS-MqF1ugvzHTXB9KBrj7W-Cp0x0Ljl6Emhg0TBoN0c0H73CRlz-q8d3mQRLD90M7_lCq_u_JS8B0AAP__CeqIKA) Friday night, punching their ticket back to the Western Conference Finals. San Antonio took control early and never let up, closing out the series 4-2 on the road. Star center Victor Wembanyama paced a young Spurs squad that sent the No. 2-seeded Wolves home in front of their own fans. ([See Recap](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnsbuNgBgIBcU16f5rr7Q2sEn2hMECgv__7U_JK1w90mi--fO1fiEnzo_fuJHv3_eyZjpaot6prm1_1YZxYA70F2ullCqF8sirEsqA0CDtGpHTz7rM0d9EdHImL611Qmq7iPnptTYaldI3IU1w2lzcmdwi7xe3WGm0mdm_y4SWVkqhpDtZe1EYFx0vIZ7J4bQIitxLPfUndfrGdk8_ZVA9hbLNyT9739t0_jWp66Sux3Gc8g3f2aSub8ykrokHwWuP2KlBwNHgWVqHnVsvucHHCYMbdzhKGtSAM-zIFcodQn0FxgQP3AhMg5Jhr7wRDI5U5urjfnBK3IydFvHYkNNnWf-_P4dX_wIAAP__OqqMiw)) Next up: a marquee showdown with the Oklahoma City Thunder. It's all in today's Texas Flyover. | | | | | | Sunday, May 17, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1839, Texas Rangers Mexican insurgent Manuel Flores and his band near the North San Gabriel River. Following the skirmish, documents were discovered that appeared to implicate the Cherokees in a plot to overthrow Texas. President Mirabeau B. Lamar’s subsequent demand for the tribe to leave the Republic instigated the Cherokee War. A Texas town ranks No. 4 on a new list of America's fastest-growing up-and-coming communities.** section to find out which city earned the ranking. In case you missed it, this week on The Flyover Podcast , Ayla Brown shared three simple habits researchers say may help keep your brain sharp as you age. Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Mother Faces Charges A 34-year-old Texas mother has been after her two children were found dead inside a burned vehicle on Friday on San Antonio's West Side. Marlene Vidal of Edinburg was detained behind a warehouse where a passerby spotted around 5 a.m. The victims were her 7-year-old daughter and 5-year-old son. Statements from Vidal, surveillance video, and scene evidence show she acted alone, police said, adding may have played a role. She has no prior record. Vidal is being held on a $2.1 million bond as investigators work to determine the fire's cause. Feds Award Big Bend Wall Deal The federal border wall contract in the Big Bend region one week after Customs and Border Protection (CBP) Commissioner Rodney Scott said no wall would be built in Big Bend National Park. The contract, listed for border barrier construction along a stretch of the Rio Grande in far West Texas, caught many by surprise, given the agency's recent assurances. Conservation groups and local residents pushed back immediately, citing the area's ecological significance and cultural heritage. On Thursday, DHS to fast-track construction--including the Endangered Species Act, the Clean Water Act, and the Clean Air Act--following a notice first reported by Marfa Public Radio. State officials and West Texas advocates are demanding of the project, including whether barriers would encroach on the national park itself. Spurs Heading to Western Conference Finals The San Antonio Spurs eliminated the Minnesota Timberwolves with a Friday night, punching their ticket back to the Western Conference Finals. San Antonio took control early and never let up, closing out the series 4-2 on the road. Star center Victor Wembanyama paced a young Spurs squad that sent the No. 2-seeded Wolves home in front of their own fans. () Next up: a marquee showdown with the Oklahoma City Thunder. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Embattled Vrabel’s First Game Slated Against Team That Beat Him In Previous Super Bowl
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Embattled Vrabel’s First Game Slated Against Team That Beat Him In Previous Super Bowl (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=85fb1e8ad3&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on May 16, 2026 03:39 pm
If the NFL’s Canoodling Coach of the Year survives the Russini affair fallout, he’ll be going up against his nemeses in the new season’s first game. The Seattle Seahawks will begin defense of their Super Bowl title against the team they defeated to win it – the team led by an ex-NFL reporter’s married boyfriend. [...]

The post Embattled Vrabel’s First Game Slated Against Team That Beat Him In Previous Super Bowl (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=b2d75d0cb3&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=a879e60d98&e=f093fa355c) .

** Southern Maine Pie Legend Who Managed The Ovens For A Half-Century Dead At 82 (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=16fa209503&e=f093fa355c)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Dedicated grassroots donors like you are my only hope of reaching this goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Please - I have nowhere else to turn.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo4dv7q1juikt3oi6q0ae3pqflajud8lfi2p4h90_rp22sh2s8i6epr4s1j60o34clh2bs)
---
| | | Friend, Our latest fundraising numbers have me so worried that I immediately typed this letter to every single top grassroots conservative we have on file. _The situation is that desperate._ **With the May end-of-month deadline rapidly approaching, we 're still far short ****of our crucial fundraising goal.** This goal isn't just some arbitrary number that I landed on. We need every last donor to compete with the _BILLIONS_ that Democrats are spending to BUY the midterm elections. **_... Especially now that the Democrats are TIED or AHEAD in the four battleground races that they need to seize control of the Senate and SHATTER the final firewall protecting the President! _** **_New York Times: Why a Democratic Senate, Once Unthinkable, Is a Real Possibility_** **" ...Democrats are ****tied or ahead in ****four**** Republican-held seats****, polls show."** We're already fighting to catch up to the Democrats in the polls, in voter enthusiasm, and most importantly, in voter verifications... The last thing we can afford is to start falling behind in fundraising! As a top America First patriot, I knew I could count on you to read this emergency correspondence. Given all that you've already done for our country, I hate to ask you to do even more, but I have no choice... I'll come right out and say it, Friend: Unlike Democrats (who can count on _BILLIONS_ from Obama's political machine), I don't have any huge checks left to cash or emergency funds left to tap into. At this late hour, dedicated grassroots donors like _YOU_ are my only hope of reaching this goal. You're truly the only place left for me to turn. **But I do want to make one thing clear:** **__[Please only contribute if you're in the position to do so.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9grlg1j07kcefov8dk5v92qb7nrou25n2ugm20_rp22sh2s8i6epr4s1j60o34clh2bs)_ _** Too many fundraising emails these days try to guilt you into donating. To me, that flies in the face of what the America First movement is all about. That's the last thing I want to do! _I understand that things are still tough for some folks as we recover from four years of Biden's disastrous economic mismanagement. If you can't afford to contribute, or you've already done all that you can, please simply disregard the rest of this message and have a wonderful day. Thank you for everything! _ But if you can contribute, I urgently need your support more than ever before... [__**Please make a strong contribution before the end-of-month deadline to help me reach this critical goal HERE >>** __](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcr4mdhtfjb27541genf8mnls7n4826cbd783f10_rp22sh2s8i6epr4s1j60o34clh2bs) Thank you, Ted Cruz
---

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: GA justices who let Trump walk are complaining their race is too political
body:
On Tuesday, let’s give them something to really whine about
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.

| [Unsubscribe](https://audience.constantcontact.com/preferences/unsubscribe?m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&c=372e9de6-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=5363af60-6c09-4de9-b5bf-c816ba8aaa30) | [Update Profile](https://audience.constantcontact.com/preferences/update/init?ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&c=372e9de6-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&t=0015hCRSlTRJbBn7kcVa2CbJg==&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&ca=5363af60-6c09-4de9-b5bf-c816ba8aaa30) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)

| | [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ofHMZ7rKYk8j4xBRb9HTXJpijIOp0AQ3jcSgKJvK1GulZe-DNZe_0O3Q__h5Sa22PdCKieNxMcXoV1lFvWXza4Qb3uWHjKal3rnLQG6sCDhbsIwap40Swdd4_Z-NRStOdC8ddiNMjq9HiHOWTfoPYc70EXeQqc3HCjS85XU0xIbD-Rjr7E5UyrpkIdIfxVkuiKRNKHXIE8UmPl3bVKSFqGuY86JuxQQ6tYHthXL9CRxp0Nz7LWNpeWlyINzERfbsh2qO13Ah3-Y=&c=HSQxLw1nphA-9uohr8zeqnOYWOlIJgPCpqr6tIUt21aT_4oFjWGI6w==&ch=nQKxwLfHqgP63QjiuclPzjCz7BcqPwR50_AXyETfdrLlYQOL0hq_RQ==)
---
| Friend,
Justices Warren and Bethel are upset.
They've been making the rounds in the Georgia press complaining that their re-election campaign has become too political.
These are the justices who looked the other way while Trump tried to steal Georgia's 2020 election.
The justices who upheld the abortion ban that is costing Georgia women their lives. Those justices think things have gotten too political.
Tuesday, we give them something to really whine about.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ofHMZ7rKYk8j4xBRb9HTXJpijIOp0AQ3jcSgKJvK1GulZe-DNZe_0O3Q__h5Sa22PdCKieNxMcXoV1lFvWXza4Qb3uWHjKal3rnLQG6sCDhbsIwap40Swdd4_Z-NRStOdC8ddiNMjq9HiHOWTfoPYc70EXeQqc3HCjS85XU0xIbD-Rjr7E5UyrpkIdIfxVkuiKRNKHXIE8UmPl3bVKSFqGuY86JuxQQ6tYHthXL9CRxp0Nz7LWNpeUqGh4zAvpgAz8EwEd9tQxM=&c=HSQxLw1nphA-9uohr8zeqnOYWOlIJgPCpqr6tIUt21aT_4oFjWGI6w==&ch=nQKxwLfHqgP63QjiuclPzjCz7BcqPwR50_AXyETfdrLlYQOL0hq_RQ==)
---
| This race is political. Of course it's political. The Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act and within days governors across the South were calling special sessions to gerrymander Democratic districts out of existence. Brian Kemp just announced Georgia's own special session. Virginia's Supreme Court threw out a voter-approved redistricting referendum. MAGA is using every court they control to choose their voters -- because they know the voters will not choose them.
Warren and Bethel are part of that machine. They have already shown us exactly whose side they're on.
Tuesday is accountability. But it's also something bigger.
We are 2-0. Pennsylvania: won. Wisconsin: won.
A win Tuesday sends us into the fight to Unpack Our Courts -- our initiative to reform and rebalance the U.S. Supreme Court -- with an undefeated record and the momentum of three consecutive wins against Leonard Leo's dark money machine.
A loss hands that machine a victory at the exact moment we need to be strongest.
Leonard Leo started this war. MAGA escalated it. We have been winning it -- court by court, state by state -- and we are not done.
One month ago the funding gap in Georgia was $3 million.
Today it is less than $275,000. Democrats from across the nation rallied to help achieve that.
$275,000 helps fund the entire final stretch. It is millions of voter contacts in the 2 days we have left.
And when Georgia is won -- starting Wednesday -- we scale up. We build the coalition to Unpack Our Courts. We find the supporters who will fund the most important constitutional fight of our lifetime. We make this movement too big to fail.
But we don't get there without finishing Georgia first.
[Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare -- to close the gap, hold the line, and walk into the biggest fight of all with a perfect record?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ofHMZ7rKYk8j4xBRb9HTXJpijIOp0AQ3jcSgKJvK1GulZe-DNZe_0O3Q__h5Sa22PdCKieNxMcXoV1lFvWXza4Qb3uWHjKal3rnLQG6sCDhbsIwap40Swdd4_Z-NRStOdC8ddiNMjq9HiHOWTfoPYc70EXeQqc3HCjS85XU0xIbD-Rjr7E5UyrpkIdIfxVkuiKRNKHXIE8UmPl3bVKSFqGuY86JuxQQ6tYHthXL9CRxp0Nz7LWNpeXjiXIii3JJcLBNgx_XV3jA=&c=HSQxLw1nphA-9uohr8zeqnOYWOlIJgPCpqr6tIUt21aT_4oFjWGI6w==&ch=nQKxwLfHqgP63QjiuclPzjCz7BcqPwR50_AXyETfdrLlYQOL0hq_RQ==)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/deb93593-c656-4b88-ba16-3d671bf9048e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The artificial intelligence firm Anthropic, which was recently thrown out of the Pentagon and declared a supply chain risk to U.S. national security by the Department of War, is actively inserting itself into American politics through large political donations. FEC records show a coordinated effort to undermine President Donald Trump and boost candidates aligned with the Democrat establishment.
New records and disclosures reveal that Anthropic recently [poured ](https://substack.com/redirect/56d32354-d53b-4cfb-8d2d-720846bd0ede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)$20 million into a 501(c)(4) called Public First Action, which then [spun](https://substack.com/redirect/6995fe17-a6d7-4024-8196-392dfe022d10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) up political action committees designed to influence the 2026 midterm elections.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0oBNA7-MH8UgD4w_giwBDja4Jzk0cIIRFNIz53IkMPI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=198062832)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea4658fa-b9dd-4340-94e9-a0a46a193bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a66158e0-d4bc-40b5-bd38-65a4835a0229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Anthropic's money flows into a nonprofit, which then seeds PACs that can directly influence elections. One of those entities, Jobs and Democracy PAC, is now emerging as a central player in funding candidates who have openly called for the removal of President Trump through extraordinary measures, or as I call it, a slow moving coup.
FEC records show the Jobs and Democracy PAC is backing multiple House candidates who have publicly supported invoking the 25th Amendment against Trump. On March 16, Jobs and Democracy PAC paid $24,000 to Public Policy Polling (PPP), a Democrat-aligned polling firm. That same day, PPP [released](https://substack.com/redirect/628bef36-5e83-4551-a9c4-7e4ee8bdb0e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a poll claiming Democrat US Senate candidate Roy Cooper was leading Republican Michael Whatley in North Carolina.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d66a034e-3f1b-45c4-a78d-64d061cf1835?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Public Policy Polling's client [list ](https://substack.com/redirect/64189112-57a9-449d-a46b-4c41a85e1c11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)reads ike a directory of Democrat power players, including Kamala Harris, Stacey Abrams, and multiple Democrat governors and senators. It also serves as a go-to polling firm for the DCCC, DSCC, DGA, and other major Democrat infrastructure groups.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a3820e1a-a054-4372-8b39-37a5801e6656?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/68d356c8-2c75-4328-8ca4-ff0cfd87a0d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9b8abdc2-3b67-443a-b392-8bcac2e1e6fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As I've previously reported, Roy Cooper is closely tied to Chuck Schumer's political machine. Here is how the pipeline works: a PAC that is funded through Anthropic-linked channels that then pays a Democrat polling firm, and a favorable poll for a Democrat candidate appears the same day. It is a classic example of manipulating the electorate to achieve a desired outcome, and Democrats have been using this dirty tactic for years.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0oBNA7-MH8UgD4w_giwBDja4Jzk0cIIRFNIz53IkMPI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=198062832)
At the same time, Jobs and Democracy PAC has been aggressively funding candidates who want to remove President Trump from office or lock him up. Representative Valerie Foushee, a Democrat Congresswoman in North Carolina, received over $1.6 million in TV and radio ad support from the Jobs and Democracy PAC in February alone. Shortly after, she posted publicly calling for President Trump to be impeached and for his cabinet to invoke the 25th Amendment:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9274cb67-4e35-4f46-b83d-86a1ba10ea30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65a3e070-bec2-483b-92e8-d2c67e8b7baf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Alex Bores, an anti-Trump Democrat Congressional candidate running for Congress in New York's 12th district to fill Democrat Congressman Jerry Nadler's seat, received multiple contributions from the Jobs and Democracy PAC to support digital ad buys, including approximately $137,000 on February 17, 2026, and $141,525 on February 23. On February 27, 2026, the PAC spent $188,700 on a digital ad buy benefiting Bores.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/740545b4-f35c-4da6-a3be-c51a6864f8ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Collin Allred, who previously voted to impeach President Trump twice, also received significant support in February, including a $150,000 digital ad and production buy for his Congressional campaign in Texas.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c0b0469-4a02-4beb-9ae5-f485eb566b0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The operation runs through firms tied to Obama-era political operatives. Jobs and Democracy PAC funneled $2,230,569 through Bryson Gillette, a firm [founded](https://substack.com/redirect/cf0736bb-f2ad-401d-baeb-a4e37c993798?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by former Obama advisor Bill Burton.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/846291ce-8324-4beb-82f3-17fad39961bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f98ea64b-d7c1-404f-b231-4035f69c88c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bryson Gillette's client network extends deep into the progressive leftist political ecosystem, including figures like Summer Lee, who recently campaigned with Muslim Communist Hasan Piker, pro-Muslim Brotherhood Michigan US Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed, and pro- Hamas Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib in Michigan. Piker has called for the assassination of President Trump and United States Senator Rick Scott, and he is on video calling for the mass murder of capitalists. Representative Lee has refused to disavow Piker's rhetoric, even after yet another assassination attempt against President Trump and members of his cabinet.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad3d6092-fd48-40c9-b77c-7ad05a59c5e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Anthropic money moves into political nonprofits as opposed to candidates directly. Those nonprofits create PACs used to fund radical left candidates, polling firms, and political consultants embedded within the Democrat machine and deeply tied to Barack Hussein Obama's political apparatus.
Anthropic recently launched its own PAC in April called "Anthropac", signaling that even more direct political spending is on the horizon from the Woke AI company. At the same time, the company is actively engaged in legal battles against the Trump administration, including its lawsuit against the Department of War.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf868a5d-80f4-493a-ad02-205bc5df2282?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is a coordinated political operation backed by massive financial resources, embedded Democrat infrastructure, and a clear ideological target.
Anthropic is building influence, shaping narratives, and funding candidates who are openly committed to taking down President Trump via a soft coup that can easily be assisted with AI technology to manipulate the masses and spread disinformation against the Trump administration and the America First Agenda. It is worth noting that all of these actions by Anthropic come at a time when their CEO, Dario Amodei, claims he and his company are not anti-American and anti-Trump [woke](https://substack.com/redirect/cb097c66-fbcb-450d-928f-a3cba7333c09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) progressive leftists.
Voters and the American people should understand exactly what is happening here. This is how power is built behind the scenes, and it's happening before our eyes. Just imagine how catastrophic a misuse of this power will be for our country if woke AI companies like Anthropic are not regulated and reeled in by the Trump administration and the Department of War.
Knowing what Anthropic's Claude model and AI are capable of, we can't afford to find out...

subject: The Iran War is Nuts
body:
It's not just oil prices that are surging.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..9UDVaGfQ_ogRB3weuHiAopQnWgFGmfnjaXt7IAn4fqQ?) for more

# [The Iran War is Nuts](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=198014457&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MDE0NDU3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzkwMTk1MzksImV4cCI6MTc4MTYxMTUzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9CVOcZXaHUCyMUZ8nN5YcGYwWVLOrGU3cN-UHw5Ku1s)
### It's not just oil prices that are surging.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| May 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=198014457&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MDE0NDU3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3OTAxOTUzOSwiZXhwIjoxNzgxNjExNTM5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pgq_nyxi9kZHU8gtU_DgjZStomXMNxr1HJthpjhELaA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=198014457&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MDE0NDU3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzkwMTk1MzksImV4cCI6MTc4MTYxMTUzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9CVOcZXaHUCyMUZ8nN5YcGYwWVLOrGU3cN-UHw5Ku1s&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/the-iran-war-is-nuts?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/66d5bbee-bede-4897-bb59-669d842c3a38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
All of us understand that our world is increasingly interconnected, yet every day I stumble upon another example of the uncertainty magnifying impact of this reality. So how do drought in California, chocolate sales at the Dubai airport, an update to Starbucks' menu, and the war in Iran connect to impact your life?
If you've bought pistachios lately, you've noticed that prices are up. In fact, prices hit an 8-year high ([$4.57 a pound in March](https://substack.com/redirect/4872c7df-f470-46c9-9457-4ea1a6719513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Globally, pistachio prices are up [more than 50%](https://substack.com/redirect/2f389b71-bc6c-44b7-b44f-7e0a60982a24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in recent months. The most recent surge in price is the result of geopolitics, and the whole thing is, well, nuts.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..835Fmfl85ko-Xm_LOe_3xg6BiN5imAJ8oAWpr0tWFwk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=198014457)
I am referring, of course, to the war in Iran. The Islamic Republic is the world's second-largest producer of pistachios, accounting for roughly [20 percent of global supply. ](https://substack.com/redirect/4872c7df-f470-46c9-9457-4ea1a6719513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)The country's pistachios are prized for their rich flavor and have been desired for centuries in baklava, ice cream, and chocolate. Let's not forget pistachios have also emerged as a top-seller in the snack aisle at your grocery store.
* * *
### FROM THE ARCHIVES!
## [5 Ways The Iranian Nuclear Deal May Affect You](https://substack.com/redirect/4e270fd8-e32e-48c7-aa4b-e460cb70814e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| July 14, 2015
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4e270fd8-e32e-48c7-aa4b-e460cb70814e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The Bastille Day announcement of a nuclear deal with Iran generated a wide range of reactions. President Obama praised the deal, noting it "had stopped the spread of nuclear weapons in the region." Presidential hopeful Jeb Bush called it "dangerous, deeply flawed, and short-sighted," while Russian President Vladimir Putin noted "the world today breathed...](https://substack.com/redirect/4e270fd8-e32e-48c7-aa4b-e460cb70814e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/4e270fd8-e32e-48c7-aa4b-e460cb70814e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Since the U.S. and Israel began striking Iran on February 28, an estimated [200,000 metric tons of Iranian pistachios](https://substack.com/redirect/2f389b71-bc6c-44b7-b44f-7e0a60982a24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are stuck in limbo, unable to reach markets. The Strait of Hormuz is [effectively](https://substack.com/redirect/4872c7df-f470-46c9-9457-4ea1a6719513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shut down. Even after the fragile ceasefire announced on April 8, ships are still being attacked by the IRGC. And as Bloomberg reported, it's not just oil that is being held back from global markets. Heaps of pistachios are sitting in Iranian warehouses with no way out.
But it wouldn't be fair to blame all of the price move on the Iran war. It was already a bad year for nut supply. [Global pistachio production is down about 8%](https://substack.com/redirect/4872c7df-f470-46c9-9457-4ea1a6719513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because 2025/2026 is an "off-year" for both American and Iranian orchards. (It turns out, I learned, that pistachio trees naturally alternate between high and low yield seasons....who knew?) That reality, combined with drought conditions in Iran, California, and Turkey, has led to depressed production. Pistachio prices were rising before a single bomb even fell.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/03901cb2-79a6-4c41-87c7-1903d5cc9d5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A supply disruption is often enough to send prices rising, but in the case of pistachios, these dynamics were met with an unexpected TikTok-fueled _demand surge_. In late 2023, Dubai chocolates (candy bars filled with a mixture of pistachio cream, tahini, and toasted shreds of filo pastry) [blew up on TikTok](https://substack.com/redirect/4872c7df-f470-46c9-9457-4ea1a6719513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) thanks to some innovative marketing by [Fix Desert Chocolatier](https://substack.com/redirect/77155ae7-1797-4d56-847b-ab3700eb1db2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The trend spread globally and quickly. The Dubai airports alone sold **2.5 million Dubai Chocolate bars in six months** , generating $45 million in revenue. And as pistachios gained in popularity, other brands began incorporating the nut into their offerings. Haagen-Dazs and Starbucks are just a two of the world's biggest brands that launched pistachio products.The [global pistachio market](https://substack.com/redirect/4872c7df-f470-46c9-9457-4ea1a6719513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is now valued at $5.5 billion and expected to hit $7.2 billion in five years.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2806ca9f-6732-45bf-82f7-d518c83038e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Supply collapsing and demand surging at the same time...that's how you get an eight-year price high. But there's more. Every time Iran loses market share, California has tended to gain...at least that's been the pattern since 1979. [Tariffs effectively ended Iranian pistachio imports to America overnight after the Iranian Revolution.](https://substack.com/redirect/72022574-3ffd-41a4-8574-6fc93d8afeff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) California's first commercial pistachio crop was just 1.5 million pounds, planted a few years before the historic events in Tehran. Today, the United States is the world's largest producer and exporter of pistachios. California now [sells more pistachios to China than Iran does](https://substack.com/redirect/4b3d3ad5-8528-4cf4-897e-3ecf97624dd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The war seems to be finishing what the 1979 sanctions started. As a San Joaquin Valley farmer with 1,600 acres of pistachio orchards told the _New York Times_ , ["With this war, it's going to limit what Iran is able to ship to customers in Europe and China."](https://substack.com/redirect/72022574-3ffd-41a4-8574-6fc93d8afeff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The result: a massive windfall for American pistachio orchard owners.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e1d83aa2-0bed-459e-8412-a58410b2b347?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But here's where things gets nutty. California grows 99% of America's pistachios in the Central Valley, one of the most water-stressed agricultural regions on Earth. [Groundwater depletion has been accelerating](https://substack.com/redirect/1f899bf3-4999-4088-a2d1-0a1c2ac5eb13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and since 2019, the rate of aquifer loss has been **31% faster than during any previous drought**. In parts of the San Joaquin Valley, [the land itself is sinking about a foot per year](https://substack.com/redirect/1f899bf3-4999-4088-a2d1-0a1c2ac5eb13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as underground water is pumped out faster than nature can replace it.
Pistachio orchards are contributing to the problem. They're permanent crops, and for economic reasons, once you plant them, you want to keep watering them for 20 years. And the industry [kept expanding even during California's worst droughts](https://substack.com/redirect/3cfd8d7c-aa54-47ed-85fe-796724c46971?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..835Fmfl85ko-Xm_LOe_3xg6BiN5imAJ8oAWpr0tWFwk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=198014457)
So, let's connect the dots. Begin with a viral TikTok video that leads to surging demand and the emergence of a global trend that captures the attention of big brands like Starbucks. To grow more pistachios to meet rising demand, California growers pump more water from aquifers that are already collapsing. Throw in a drought, a natural lull in yield, and a war that prevents supply from reaching markets...
This concoction of events, which have produced today's pistachio prices, is enough to leave you, well, shellshocked.

---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/bee2f45c-5da1-4dcd-9720-8e8ec885c415?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/63e00bfe-27a8-4912-94b4-8eefd70abdd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/2553db05-be66-428d-907a-8e797ee32fcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/1bc43e97-a218-49dd-a8b0-085130d04f51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **Did you just hear what my opponent said?** [](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12674?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Luria-Opponent_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T0&t=4&akid=2286%2E259176%2EQKEJD8) | [SPLIT A DONATION TO FLIP VA-02](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12674?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Luria-Opponent_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T0&t=5&akid=2286%2E259176%2EQKEJD8)
---
These heinous comments come at a time when the Supreme Court and Republican controlled state legislatures are disenfranchising Black voters and wiping out Black representation across southern states.
_Jen Kiggans doesn’t just sit back and let this happen; she applauds it._
Rep. Kiggans should immediately apologize and denounce these horrific, racist remarks that have no place in our Commonwealth or our politics, but that’s just the first step.
The only way we can rebuild a free and fair democracy is to ensure that every person has the right to cast their vote without political interference.
**And the only way to do that is to flip the House majority.**
Our race is pivotal to that fight, so if you’re as outraged as I am by the _Voting Rights Act rulings_ , MAGA gerrymandering, and my opponent’s attack on Rep. Jeffries, **I hope you’ll join my coalition of patriots today. **
[**Will you split a contribution of $20 between my battleground campaign and Blue Amp Action so we have the resources to pounce on this moment and ensure Kiggans pays the price for her words and actions in November? **](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12674?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Luria-Opponent_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T0&t=6&akid=2286%2E259176%2EQKEJD8)

Together,
Elaine Luria

We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to keep amplifying real leaders who will fight for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=10&t=11&refcode2=2286_259176_QKEJD8&akid=2286%2E259176%2EQKEJD8)**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: $3 to take back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
We’re asking you to donate $3 today.
No, that’s not a typo — just $3.
There are three Democrats running for the U.S. Senate in the most competitive seats that GIFFORDS has already endorsed, and the outcome of these three races will decide which party holds the Senate majority.
_If you need a reminder, they are Jon Ossoff in Georgia, Roy Cooper in North Carolina, and Sherrod Brown in Ohio._
Democrats need to flip four seats to retake the Senate majority. National Republicans will spend whatever it takes to flood the airwaves with negative attacks against Democrats like these, so we have to fight back.
**That’s why we’re asking you to chip in $3 to help us support Democrats like these three and elect gun safety champions across the country.**
**[So what do you say? Chip in $3 or more so GIFFORDS PAC can reach voters in swing states >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/66845?c0=giffords-em-q22026.IhX-R5&refcode=em260517-1-b&t=1&akid=11479%2E3935704%2E6X277j)

body:
Justice Elena Kagan is sounding the alarm about the Supreme Court’s decision to gut the Voting Rights Act of 1965 | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Justice Elena Kagan is sounding the alarm about the Supreme Court’s decision to _gut_ the Voting Rights Act – a ruling that makes it easier for Republicans to eliminate majority-minority districts. ** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDr1cKrNgWcK1gk9crQ94aT3lKj2owQRXddbCw7bitZ9ThQq6DGXhWWhCyzRwzm7XZ_kvizX9gnh6QUUYT_0wPI8VcUWBWgFKEDsNHT2E2-mDadwYnLJT8slPEFiK9oNdAq2UKqD87nBdSidL7UmAajd2cO81V2DJ6iz5PwE-02LqaPs2mJuFgjfoS4ie2W-K-74CDvad6slcr8yP92Si_0d_GtLZPj17jWIbUZr5L7PIpTl7OYEEc2ro-bEsEVupD3d3nf0Nkhk0UVg1x8wAKHONruIwVkjA5Uhd7GcofDqCa4n3oqlsM2nwljB9kr-7GBOXPZF0n6pKZs9GgA0NUQSm9KAZAaLS05u_8bcYqKrf9vgEDYD2l4fSW-WLvJbC2/4qp/ejx0EpRTQQOIDd8TCKv22w/h0/h001.AcBKQ9lztOn4jY5Kk4PdR9a3fPEODxH5viAfUxHD_1E) Rolling back protections for voters of color has opened the door to extreme voter suppression and gerrymandering in red states like Florida and Tennessee. It’s a shameful betrayal of the Civil Rights Movement. This is a moment that calls for us to fight back and to play the long game. Winning new Democratic majorities is the only way to ensure that Democrats are not permanently shut out of a U.S. House majority. We need to win back power at the state level so that Democrats can stand up for civil rights. [Can you chip in $7 to the DLCC to build durable Democratic majorities and stand up to GOP gerrymandering? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDr1cKrNgWcK1gk9crQ94aT3lKj2owQRXddbCw7bitZ9ThQq6DGXhWWhCyzRwzm7XZ_kvizX9gnh6QUUYT_0wPI8VcUWBWgFKEDsNHT2E2-mDadwYnLJT8slPEFiK9oNdAq2UKqD87nBdSidL7UmAajfQXaNEbaumMdpoZzFOTYa3znDyFaLDWvIYt7jcPMttyXhON2_gnHBE0SA-hyCpDZLwpfVp37SZ3nIRarXd1mzUbpvY4iXdnLfL1ZYfrDmUfAAKARtziNYgEjh8jA3uS4GAMeiUG8SvD4PXqG3KMRpgsb02YbLqN9I8LpQd2kOcEEPD-4p0PitQmFGUShPK5CqRfp490UzQ0PRuMfbdnHTiVU3BarrmFzarl7xXEI44_/4qp/ejx0EpRTQQOIDd8TCKv22w/h1/h001.EhnVhq4uaxZqCMs9L9Lm5Yp3hTToUhs33fhSk80ugeU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Justice Elena Kagan is sounding the alarm about the Supreme Court’s decision to gut the Voting Rights Act of 1965 | | | | | ---|--- Justice Elena Kagan is sounding the alarm about the Supreme Court’s decision to gut the Voting Rights Act – a ruling that makes it easier for Republicans to eliminate majority-minority districts. Rolling back protections for voters of color has opened the door to extreme voter suppression and gerrymandering in red states like Florida and Tennessee. It’s a shameful betrayal of the Civil Rights Movement. This is a moment that calls for us to fight back and to play the long game. Winning new Democratic majorities is the only way to ensure that Democrats are not permanently shut out of a U.S. House majority. We need to win back power at the state level so that Democrats can stand up for civil rights. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: This comes from the heart.
body:
I’m so proud to be in this with you.

| | | | Peter,
They call us “radicals.”
They call us “extremists.”
They call us “deplorables.”
The media mocks us. The Hollywood elites look down on us. The D.C. swamp tries to break us every single day.
But when I look at you, Peter, I don’t see any of that,

I see a patriot.
I see a hero who works hard, loves their family, and stands up for what is right, even when it’s not popular.
I see someone with a spine of steel who loves this country too much to let it go. I don't say this enough, but I am so incredibly proud to be in this fight with you.
I wanted to send you this personal message as a small token of my appreciation. Something to remind you that you are seen, you are valued, and you are vital to saving America. | [ ACCEPT MY THANKS >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
Thank you for being the best part of my job.

With gratitude,
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-hHHb8sAknQ)
Marsha Blackburn
| |
---
| | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---

Brentwood, TN 37024
