name: VoteVets HQ
subject: The President of the United States is Our Greatest National Security Threat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter, this is genuinely outrageous.
On January 6th, Donald Trump purchased up to $1,000,000 of stock in Nvidia. One week later, Trump’s Commerce Department approved sales of some of Nvidia’s most advanced AI chips to China — arguably our chief geopolitical opponent.
Then, on February 10th, Donald Trump purchased as much as $5,000,000 in Nvidia stock a week before they announced a partnership with Meta.
Our most valuable assets as a nation are just lines on a balance sheet to the President of the United States. He was willing to hand those critical national security assets over to China so he could make a quick buck.
This news comes after Trump started a war of choice that sent inflation skyrocketing, has left 13 Americans dead, many regional military bases virtually uninhabitable, and our international allies questioning the resilience and value of our alliances.
This has to be repeated: **Donald Trump is the Greatest National Security Threat to the United States of America.**
But there’s something we can do about it that has bipartisan support and the backing of a wide majority of the American people. It is time to ban members of the Trump family and White House from trading stocks — as well as all Members of Congress.
[**Please, if you’re with us, sign on here and endorse our demand to end stock trading in the White House and Congress.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260517_INSIDER_TRADING_EM/?source=em260517-1-60&refcode2=35154.3013755.wxPDsr&akid=35154%2E3013755%2EwxPDsr)
| [SIGN ON](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260517_INSIDER_TRADING_EM/?source=em260517-1-60&refcode2=35154.3013755.wxPDsr&akid=35154%2E3013755%2EwxPDsr)
---
The President of the United States can’t be allowed to compromise our National Security to enrich himself. It’s ridiculous, and this has to stop.
Thank you in advance.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=35154%2E3013755%2EwxPDsr).

It's May 2026. Election Day is still months away and most conservative donors are sitting on their wallets.

**M-O-N-T-H-S.**
The infrastructure must be in place (and optimized) before early voting begins — not after.
Democrats know this. That’s why their dark money machine is writing checks right now. Today.

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Roy Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: Lies, money and more lies
body:
I simply cannot fight back and win without your help.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
| | | |
---
Our Senate race is heating up, Peter.

Over the past couple months, we’ve received an outpouring of grassroots support from people who are fed up with what’s happening in our country and ready for change.
Those $5 and $10 donations are critically important: Experts say that Democrats have no chance at taking back the Senate without winning in North Carolina.
**Now, Republicans are seeing our momentum, and they’re starting to panic.** President Trump and JD Vance are personally attacking me with lies and spreading misinformation – and earlier this month, the GOP promised to spend nearly $100 million to defeat me.

**Peter, the GOP’s attacks are working: A recent poll shows this race statistically tied.**
[**I’m confident in the grassroots movement we’re building, but I simply cannot fight back and win without your help. Please, Peter****, will you chip in $5 or more today to help us flip North Carolina blue and take back the Senate?**](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11343?amount=5&t=8&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11344?amount=5&t=9&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11344?amount=25&t=10&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11344?amount=50&t=11&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11343?t=12&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
---
Any amount makes a huge difference. All that matters is that you’re deciding to chip in.

Thank you,

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1431%2E124072%2Elu4DSD)_**

clean_body: I simply cannot fight back and win without your help. | | | | | Our Senate race is heating up, Peter. Over the past couple months, we’ve received an outpouring of grassroots support from people who are fed up with what’s happening in our country and ready for change. Those $5 and $10 donations are critically important: Experts say that Democrats have no chance at taking back the Senate without winning in North Carolina. Now, Republicans are seeing our momentum, and they’re starting to panic. President Trump and JD Vance are personally attacking me with lies and spreading misinformation – and earlier this month, the GOP promised to spend nearly $100 million to defeat me. Peter, the GOP’s attacks are working: A recent poll shows this race statistically tied. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Any amount makes a huge difference. All that matters is that you’re deciding to chip in. Thank you, Roy Cooper | | Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** | | | | | | mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. name: Veronica Escobar
subject: The fight for equal education didn’t end in 1954
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Veronica Escobar for Congress
body:
The legacy of Brown v. Board is still shaping the fight for public education today.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131558284/621530845/-1405467182?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmViOTA5NS1mNDUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3wy298WKQxyVU9mVHGNsYeTnmQ9wMpl6WclFbJYHdBA=&emci=a869bb85-7650-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=dbeb9095-f451-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=14565883)
---

| | Seventy-two years ago today, the Supreme Court's decision in _Brown v.__Board of Education_ declared school segregation unconstitutional. It was a hard-fought win, but unfortunately, it didn't end inequality in our school systems. Long before that decision, separate never truly meant equal, and in many ways, it still doesn't. Today, a child's education is still dictated by their zip code or a lottery system, determining their access to books, counselors, advanced classes, extracurricular activities, and even the number of teachers in the classroom. As a former teacher, I've seen firsthand the burden our schools carry. Educators are asked to do more with less while navigating overcrowded classrooms, limited resources, rising out-of-pocket costs, and increasing political attacks on what they can teach and what students can learn. **Public education is one of the clearest reflections of what we value as a society. Right now, the current administration's actions suggest they don't value education at all.** When politicians push to defund schools and erase history, they make it harder for students to feel safe and seen. When public education is undermined, the ripple effects of the consequences are felt far beyond the classroom. We see it in declining literacy rates, weakened critical thinking skills, and a generation being denied the tools they need to fully participate in our democracy. Every child, regardless of their background, deserves the opportunity to build a future with dignity. The legacy of _Brown v. Board_ isn't just a history lesson — it's an ongoing responsibility. We owe this generation of students more than symbolic progress. We owe them real investment, honest history, and genuine opportunity to succeed. [**If you believe every child deserves access to a quality public education, chip in $3 today to help us keep fighting for students, teachers, and families across our community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131558294/621530856/2141769129?refcode=2026-05-17-brownvboard&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=dbeb9095-f451-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmViOTA5NS1mNDUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3wy298WKQxyVU9mVHGNsYeTnmQ9wMpl6WclFbJYHdBA=) With gratitude, _Veronica_ | Donate Today If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Veronica Escobar instantly:

clean_body: The legacy of Brown v. Board is still shaping the fight for public education today. | | | | Seventy-two years ago today, the Supreme Court's decision in Brown v.Board of Education declared school segregation unconstitutional. It was a hard-fought win, but unfortunately, it didn't end inequality in our school systems. Long before that decision, separate never truly meant equal, and in many ways, it still doesn't. Today, a child's education is still dictated by their zip code or a lottery system, determining their access to books, counselors, advanced classes, extracurricular activities, and even the number of teachers in the classroom. As a former teacher, I've seen firsthand the burden our schools carry. Educators are asked to do more with less while navigating overcrowded classrooms, limited resources, rising out-of-pocket costs, and increasing political attacks on what they can teach and what students can learn. Public education is one of the clearest reflections of what we value as a society. Right now, the current administration's actions suggest they don't value education at all. When politicians push to defund schools and erase history, they make it harder for students to feel safe and seen. When public education is undermined, the ripple effects of the consequences are felt far beyond the classroom. We see it in declining literacy rates, weakened critical thinking skills, and a generation being denied the tools they need to fully participate in our democracy. Every child, regardless of their background, deserves the opportunity to build a future with dignity. The legacy of Brown v. Board isn't just a history lesson — it's an ongoing responsibility. We owe this generation of students more than symbolic progress. We owe them real investment, honest history, and genuine opportunity to succeed. = With gratitude, Veronica | Donate Today If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Veronica Escobar instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Veronica Escobar for Congress. |

name: Team Andy
subject: Andy just cut the gas tax.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Here's why that matters.
Peter,

We’re going to be straight with you.

People are hurting at the pump. Families are making impossible choices between filling up their tank and putting food on the table or paying for medicine they need. And for too long, politicians have used gas prices as a talking point without actually helping.

Andy Beshear is not that kind of politician. As Governor of Kentucky, he just cut the state gas tax – because when working families are struggling, that's exactly what leaders are supposed to do.

No hedging. No waiting. No excuses. **➤➤ UPDATE: Ohio's Republican Secretary of State handed voter data to Trump. Democrats just nominated his replacement.**
Friend, we have a big update out of a key DASS battleground for the coming midterms. Ohio's outgoing Secretary of State has drawn serious backlash for handing over the private voter information of roughly 8 million Ohioans to the Trump administration — including driver's license numbers and partial Social Security data. He did it without a subpoena or any legal requirement to do so. This is what happens when a Secretary of State prioritizes partisan loyalty over the voters they were elected to protect. **And it's exactly why the race to replace him is emerging as a key state on our 2026 battlefield map.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131564950/621545339/-209663061?refcode=em-5.17.26-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDgwZmMzMS1mOTUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tv89HPVbtucBwIrz-jRzPOj0pUnLkC7LjZaasbWrwI8=) Democrats just nominated **Allison Russo** \-- a veteran state legislator who served on Ohio's Redistricting Commission and spent years fighting Republican gerrymandering from the inside. She knows exactly how this system gets abused and is running to be a guardrail against it. The Republican nominee is **Robert Sprague** , a Republican who built his campaign around stoking fears of voter fraud in a state where even the outgoing Secretary of State said fraud is “rare.” **It is critical that MAGA acolytes like Sprage are not at the helm of our elections in 2028 – which is why we are reaching out:** **[This seat is winnable – so are a number of critical races across the country where Democrats are standing FIRM against election deniers and Trump allies. name: Lorenza Ramirez
subject: This is what you’re funding >>
body:
---
Hi Derek, it’s Lorenza Ramirez, the DNC’s National Organizing Director. I wanted to pop in and give you a brief update about _When We Count_ , our largest voter registration program in DNC history. Within the last few weeks, we’ve onboarded our first 40 Fellows in Phoenix, Arizona — and we’re only growing. By June, we’re on track to expand our team to 75 Fellows in Arizona _alone_. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260517_7152_fr&amount=7&refcode2=7152_22930333_rOUN7w&akid=7152%2E22930333%2ErOUN7w) We’re training Fellows not just to register voters, but to think creatively and strategically about where conversations can happen. Fellows are organizing online, mobilizing their networks, and going to concerts, cafes, and thrift stores to register young people to vote. They’re putting in the work to register **250,000 Democratic voters** in key battleground states like Arizona before November’s midterms. Already this year, we’re seeing Democratic voters show up in a big way — in the last few months, states like Texas and Illinois have seen record-breaking voter turnout at the ballot box. At the DNC, we’re seeing that as proof that when we reach voters, they show up. **It’s been so exciting getting to watch _When We Count_ come to life — and we’re just getting started.** [**So Derek, when you chip in to the DNC, this is what you’re funding. If work like this is important to you, we’re asking you to pitch in $7 to help us continue reaching voters in key battleground states and all across the country, and to ensure that we have the grassroots power to elect Democrats at all levels of government this year and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260517_7152_fr&refcode2=7152_22930333_rOUN7w&akid=7152%2E22930333%2ErOUN7w) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260517_7152_fr&refcode2=7152_22930333_rOUN7w&akid=7152%2E22930333%2ErOUN7w)**

Already this year, we’re seeing Democratic voters show up in a big way — in the last few months, states like Texas and Illinois have seen record-breaking voter turnout at the ballot box. At the DNC, we’re seeing that as proof that when we reach voters, they show up. It’s been so exciting getting to watch When We Count come to life — and we’re just getting started. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Lorenza Lorenza Ramirez Organizing Director Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
MAGA is in panic mode as their gerrymandering schemes are backfiring. We can’t let up now.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b-NiaWR3_-ylpt4Qt5Ozf6C1ZX7VAMlXdyKbhs5_BTHWp4KN_VuNnj4__51NqjjAsbTqCvBQKxwqhCvwh_hSzuOmXaSmTVtMPmPuuGBoSkHvVmqmWNQAxvxrlRYP9xF8lBII7KXUDQ7K2SZL3-Hk-iM006cAtspCl92x7eFGOWQC4VQpJHBbo3CcsiJnXblPpoNppoXrBCpcm1yKq7kCr2oQ51QQ5hb13HBvRF-l11w=&c=0KNOzxbep0C3Sz8wLC8hHmNjciEYPPB4-eTMZQh9jJ5bw4IbMYuJQg==&ch=WNTjx778jVUutRgeLB-Zlw5LaLmBIOaGBT5Ao3CwS9W54bB4jFv3ag==)
---
|
Peter,
Something is happening in Georgia and MAGA did not see it coming.
Democratic turnout surged in the final days of early voting. Black voter participation is up. The Republican scheme to suppress Democratic votes through racial gerrymandering -- enabled by the Supreme Court's VRA ruling -- is backfiring at the ballot box before Tuesday's election even happens.
Their plan is backfiring. Ours is working.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b-NiaWR3_-ylpt4Qt5Ozf6C1ZX7VAMlXdyKbhs5_BTHWp4KN_VuNnj4__51NqjjAsbTqCvBQKxwqhCvwh_hSzuOmXaSmTVtMPmPuuGBoSkHvVmqmWNQAxvxrlRYP9xF8lBII7KXUDQ7K2SZL3-Hk-iM006cAtspCl92x7eFGOWQC4VQpJHBbo3CcsiJnXblPpoNppoXrBCpcm1yKq7kCr3-_tafhay0VFl8QoiCZzmI=&c=0KNOzxbep0C3Sz8wLC8hHmNjciEYPPB4-eTMZQh9jJ5bw4IbMYuJQg==&ch=WNTjx778jVUutRgeLB-Zlw5LaLmBIOaGBT5Ao3CwS9W54bB4jFv3ag==)
---
Here is why this moment is so dangerous.
When we are winning is exactly when dark money operations pour in everything they have left. Leonard Leo's network did not spend this much to lose in the final 48 hours. They are watching the same numbers we are watching -- and they are spending right now. This is not the moment to exhale. This is the moment to run through the tape.
Together, we helped fund a multi-million dollar coalition program to reach Georgia voters -- in a non-partisan judicial election where most voters have no idea which candidates stand for democracy and which ones protected Trump when he tried to steal their state in 2020.
That program is working. The surge is real.
But Jen Jordan and Miracle Rankin are running against two justices -- Warren and Bethel -- who have the power of incumbency, the backing of Leo's dark money machine, and 48 hours to close the gap our program opened.
A win Tuesday does something that cannot be gerrymandered away.
It puts us on the path to flipping the Georgia Supreme Court before the 2028 presidential election -- before the court that already covered for Trump rules on Kemp's redistricting maps, voting rights challenges, and every election lawsuit that lands in Georgia before the next presidential election.
We are 2-0. Pennsylvania. Wisconsin. This is the one that makes us 3-0 heading into the fight to Unpack Our Courts and rebalance the Supreme Court of the United States. We cannot lose this one with the finish line in sight.
[Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare right now, in the final 48 hours to make sure we leave nothing on the field?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b-NiaWR3_-ylpt4Qt5Ozf6C1ZX7VAMlXdyKbhs5_BTHWp4KN_VuNnj4__51NqjjA50c-CanNOFa5zDihbUtw4mZXWDb4JSnp1uhuuXIyyqrkbz6NPLXYqSh8bZnVvLz_u7bb8Pm1exXTOsNCeNkFV-1b1bDQTkoigvBn4r0rdxTEdLObT_mhSZwsUf4lpZKMf5Dyv_48g-dC7RsqNDz6loq7iG7qNjvnCdW8rukW_ReMkLGhNx6LnumzFeai7oDC&c=0KNOzxbep0C3Sz8wLC8hHmNjciEYPPB4-eTMZQh9jJ5bw4IbMYuJQg==&ch=WNTjx778jVUutRgeLB-Zlw5LaLmBIOaGBT5Ao3CwS9W54bB4jFv3ag==)

body:
| | |
---
Friend, this is really telling:

My MAGA-funded Democratic opponent’s average donation is **$1,670.64**.
Mine?

**[$35.43.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8194?refcode=jtk716-fr-nd&t=1&akid=9626%2E400544%2EZexHUr)**
I’ll just leave that there.

It says everything about who this campaign belongs to — and who theirs does.
While they rely on big checks **(including $9,838.08 average gifts from the same donors who elected Trump)** , we’re powered by real people across New Mexico chipping in what they can. Folks who know exactly what I’m fighting for: lower costs, stronger schools, safer communities, and access to healthcare. And folks who know I can deliver — because I have. In Congress, I got five bills passed and Trump signed them into law, and as Secretary of the Interior, I managed an $18 billion budget and a 70,000-person workforce.
But here’s the reality: For every big corporation and wealthy MAGA donor they get, we need dozens of grassroots supporters to keep up. With attack ads already on the air and early voting underway, we can’t afford to fall behind.
**_[So I’m asking: Will you chip in $35.43 — or anything you can — before midnight to help us fight back and win this race the right way?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8194?refcode=jtk716-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9626%2E400544%2EZexHUr)_**
Thank you for being on this true grassroots team,

Deb

body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYEN21E42hwTS24t7C3nZ4ml9lKOCAcakkWAeqqyG_N1wg07abjWGKVXgJhbCIApzVoVKPzaQ37E5XWw_0PWjsodvqkGaAlw5uZFg

A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
Sound of FreedomThe men arrested included a teacher, a cruise ship worker… and even a Santa Claus ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYFadl0U35c5htpqKJi4XkA7luS40mZeR89QxqTBftOvaWrSEn7AxI3XjEZViTShZTcU6sTxck5mg2OauYhpllMQ91RF8BzNHPvSg

GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE

Friend,

Most people think child traffickers look evil.

They don’t.

Sometimes they look like a teacher.

Sometimes they look like a cruise ship worker smiling at families on vacation.

Sometimes they even dress like Santa Claus.

That is the terrifying truth America is waking up to. And sadly, the news today reminds us why this mission matters so much.

- Disney cruise ship staffers among 28 arrested in massive child pornography operation.

- Well-known Santa Claus among 19 arrested in child predator sting.

- High School math teacher among 89 arrested in human trafficking operation.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYGZ7dXp1eNbom6VK89NpcGPrsJXXcQMRmQicaGzFzT7HqrGgCrSTwNZuZza7vpwtjn9giMJroaFB8YE_duujvqnNwma85OKxXF1w

Three different stories.
Three different places.

But all convey one chilling truth ties them all together:

The people who prey on children are hiding in plain sight.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYH9YUmLAx7CS47TQqnLR6HrmhvdSKrmcH6piiDREV80FMiGf_KxUMgC2ZQHqpoZycN91eRfzYcfknkqGXtH5NZuLKqdQyTDK5kzg
Stand Against Child Trafficking

My name is Eduardo Verástegui.

I am the producer of Sound of Freedom and founder of the Sound of Freedom Foundation.

Years ago, after hearing firsthand stories about trafficked children, my life changed forever.

What I learned broke my heart.

Children were being bought and sold like products.

And most people had no idea this darkness existed. Thart's why I helped create the Sound of Freedom film.

Not for fame. Not for Hollywood.

But because I believed people needed to see the truth.

Many people told us the movie would fail.

Studios rejected it. Doors closed.
But I could not stay silent.

When innocent children are suffering, silence becomes part of the problem.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYIN-iAtjeNnoY6eTWhAJgRLAtzIc4X-U9EN5PlFCbLhO3azQ8kRGdzOo4vEXN4eoamd5XAv6ZK1L8WAY7iNUvrQJIU0vvWxdwWBA

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYJmhe1qCO4L1thJNtTKJjcmZxveEKRnYvN6k9nRDUKL2KTa2hr3By5XYL85q9G-OGK0Vlu3muX6pT1U9usNcI14ikxHESVKU3ktw
Stand Against Child Trafficking

Recently, while accepting the Catholic Champion Award, I shared the promise that still guides my life today:

“I made a promise to God, to dedicate my life to ending child trafficking because God’s children are not for sale.”

That promise became the Sound of Freedom Foundation.

Today, we are working to protect vulnerable children through prevention, rescue support, education, awareness, and advocacy.

- We help strengthen struggling families before traffickers can target their children.

- We equip trusted partners working to rescue exploited children.

- We educate parents and communities about warning signs predators use to groom and manipulate children.

- We advocate for stronger laws to protect innocent lives.

Jesus said:

“Let the little children come to me… for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these.” (Matthew 19:14)

Every child is created by God with dignity.

Every child deserves safety.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYKLoX0gO6ZEiAEIHR2UmsgoQB3bHxh7_CEBE-Kj7MXVGd1z6LXt83vUArVsdzUn6x7HIXnTLify-EEL3Yy6OPgMVMFF1mOJDjgHg
Stand Against Child Trafficking

And every one of us has a choice:

Look away or stand up and protect them.

That's why I am reaching out to you today.

Friend, will you make your first gift to help stop the sale of God’s children?

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYLSerbDrfu3hdkS98Sx8p1JPOEbCQSktSpfZz0RgndMY76U_jKwIv-hGkTf4xkutBdVKGy16I3gvOVfNE699bKfVdwQ3kPS9pNRQ
Your gift of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give today will help protect vulnerable children and support efforts to fight trafficking before more lives are destroyed.

The predators are hiding in plain sight.

But together, we can shine light into the darkness. And together, we can tell the world:

God’s Children are Not For Sale.

For God’s children,

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYMuVik1BQmRYSGIefBFr96KATjeSj1QDpZoYnyLD9udkyy4B1KSu8eTB0KjiDjaZC9tps3qSCkouWIvjNlWuG6CN6LLr1xgXvv-g

Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4Nzl9AAwAAAAAAK_FcTYN5mVMsvpWSz60uDaOop9kWu61G2NkICzVTIoYA4b1irzrPDuWCcKz5moXR72cpDud6VB_73BnvpgdQV-g4aCQh00nIPG6wUG8Kg

For God’s children, Eduardo Verástegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

subject: The stakes in New Hampshire could not be higher.

body:
| | | It's Governor JB Pritzker.

I'm emailing you today about New Hampshire's Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans' hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**

**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $7 or more between Chris Pappas and the DSCC to keep New Hampshire blue and flip the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21818?amount=7&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FM-20260517-JBPritzker-PappasJBSignedSununuTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20260517-JBPritzker-PappasJBSignedSununuTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=23874%2E9716520%2EVbVn68)**

_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats could face a harder time taking back a majority in the Senate._ That's why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.

The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they're "all‐in" on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.

This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.

Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he's seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That's why I'm reaching out to you today.

**[If you're with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you split $7 between Chris's campaign and the DSCC today to help him defend New Hampshire's seat and help Democrats take back the Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21818?amount=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FM-20260517-JBPritzker-PappasJBSignedSununuTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20260517-JBPritzker-PappasJBSignedSununuTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=23874%2E9716520%2EVbVn68)**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Donald Trump yells at, insults reporter for challenging him with the truth.
body:
This is the kind of courage we need more of
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Donald Trump Yells at, Insults Reporter for Challenging His Lies With Truth.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta68690c6-da05-4427-a341-9f3766c43398/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0654fdb-bc00-4542-83d9-0492dc0a0daa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action?[Click here for others](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e62afcb-33c5-4196-a43d-c38f226875ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Want to unsubscribe? See link below_ Akayla Gardner is an excellent reporter and White House correspondent for MSNOW (MSNBC). And as you may have seen this week,[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01a5328f-2c8b-456e-b98e-ee90275ecfb5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[she’s not afraid](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta11f6100-23dc-4508-a755-4dee88c7e9aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to push back against Trump and his lies.** Donald Trump, a chronic jerk, berated Gardner for asking an entirely fair question and correctly pointing out his obvious lie about his ballroom project. _“You wanted [Federal Reserve Chair] Jerome Powell fired for cost overruns,” Gardner pointed out to Trump, referring to the Fed’s ongoing renovation project of its Washington headquarters. “How is that different than your ballroom and the reflecting pool?”_ _“What happened is that we have a ballroom that’s under budget,” Trump replied. “It’s going up right here. I’ve doubled the size of it because we obviously need that, and we’re right now on budget, under budget, and ahead of schedule.”_[This is bullsh*t] _“The price has doubled,” Gardner pointed out._ _Trump snapped back: “I doubled the size of it, you dumb person. You are not a smart person.” ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2438c10-552a-41bb-a43d-475544de4059/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ Trump lies as casually as most people breathe, and Gardner did exactly what good reporters are supposed to do: calmly, firmly, and publicly push back with facts. **[This is the kind of courage](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f971c66-a5e0-4931-b97b-fbafcf76ea16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that is in short supply these days, with far too many people too afraid (perhaps understandably) to get in his path.** And for that, she deserves [thanks](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7551fde0-c660-499f-bbae-1b9e2baa75ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), not abuse. **[Please add your name, and thank her. “Thank you, Akayla Gardner, for standing strong against Trump’s lies.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b73f19b-9bd2-4559-a83f-7d6e68d30f0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf65df04a-6bca-40c4-a997-d9cf68d2e369/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, and remember to SHARE THIS to help keep up the pressure! Left Action [(P.S. - Go here for other actions)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82c9a797-bd79-44ea-9934-e1b002f4c201/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d6db26a-ae54-4b51-bf51-10c58b382345/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Substack](https://default.salsalabs.org/T600453d5-9d04-4ddc-92e5-c13ac80b829c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa2ff3e8-1047-42af-beb4-78a7e1152e83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b8d49dd-65a8-476b-ad37-6d1f815dbc81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Shaun Finnie
subject: “I don't think about Americans’ financial situation”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Shaun Finnie For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0517 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0517]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0517 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0517]
Friend — When Trump was asked about Americans struggling financially, he said:
“I don’t think about Americans’ financial situation.”
At a time when inflation is at a three year high, when families are drowning in higher prices, rising bills, and economic anxiety, the President of the United States just admitted that he does not care and is not thinking about you .
Not your rent.
Not your groceries.
Not your healthcare bills.
Not whether you can afford to fill up your tank this week.
And honestly, it shows. The only thing this guy cares about is ripping you off to line his own pockets.
I’m running for Congress because I’m sick of watching Trump rip off Americans, ruin our world standing, and treat working families like an afterthought.
I’m going to fight to lower costs, protect and expand healthcare, and build an economy that actually works for regular people again.
So if you’re angry too, chip in whatever you can right now — and let’s flip TX-02. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0517] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0516]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=10&refcode=em0517&express_lane=true] Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=20&refcode=em0517&express_lane=true] Donate $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=35&refcode=em0517&express_lane=true] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=50&refcode=em0517&express_lane=true] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=100&refcode=em0517&express_lane=true] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0517]
People deserve leaders who actually think about them. That's what I'll do in D.C.
Thanks for your support.
— Shaun Finnie

name: Michael
subject: We're officially on the air in Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm reaching out to say thank you.
**Our campaign's first ad – _"Drive" _– is now live on TV screens statewide. **And it's all thanks to the people powering this grassroots movement, like you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131567586/621554833/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1420-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWU2ZDJjMi1mZjUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2y1hbS8G103kpKGvHszOuOq8R2tQ9SHBIuHIxfq4l8M=)
But now that the governor's race is officially in full swing, our next challenge is to keep it on the air: _because ad reservations don't come cheap._
_[**That's why I set a $5,000 rapid-response goal for our team to hit by 11:59 p.m. tonight. Can I please count on your help to reach it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131567587/621554834/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1420-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWU2ZDJjMi1mZjUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2y1hbS8G103kpKGvHszOuOq8R2tQ9SHBIuHIxfq4l8M=)_
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131567588/621554835/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1420-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWU2ZDJjMi1mZjUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2y1hbS8G103kpKGvHszOuOq8R2tQ9SHBIuHIxfq4l8M=)
---
**With ballots arriving in the mail any day now, we had no choice but to buy air time of our own to set the record straight. **
But the goal I set for tonight will decide whether we have the funds to keep it running, or have to take it down and cede the airwaves. That's not an option if we want to win this primary.

And it's all thanks to the people powering this grassroots movement, like you. = But now that the governor's race is officially in full swing, our next challenge is to keep it on the air: because ad reservations don't come cheap. = | | = With ballots arriving in the mail any day now, we had no choice but to buy air time of our own to set the record straight. But the goal I set for tonight will decide whether we have the funds to keep it running, or have to take it down and cede the airwaves. That's not an option if we want to win this primary. So I'm humbly asking:= Please use the links in this email to start a weeky donation through ActBlue. | | | = | = | | = | = Whether you've been with me since April, or just found out about my campaign yesterday – I'm so grateful to have you on this team. name: Chris Pappas
subject: Let’s look at the math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=6687%2E582294%2EeXg06m)
Friend, I need you to understand the stakes of our Senate race and why [**your $5 contribution could have an impact on the Senate majority.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260517_1.CeJqoM&amount=5&refcode=em20260517-1&t=2&akid=6687%2E582294%2EeXg06m)
Right now Republicans hold a 53-47 majority in the U.S. Senate. To take back the majority, Democrats need a net gain of four seats.
The path to the majority runs right through New Hampshire.
Everyone from Donald Trump and national Republicans to the far-right super PACs bankrolling my opponent know that this is the "must-win" seat of the cycle. If they flip New Hampshire red, they effectively end our chances at a Democratic majority.
**There is zero margin for error.**
[**That’s why I’m coming to you to ask: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help power my campaign and help Democrats flip the Senate?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260517_1.CeJqoM&amount=5&refcode=em20260517-1&t=3&akid=6687%2E582294%2EeXg06m)

Thanks for standing with us,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260517-1&t=23&refcode2=6687_582294_eXg06m&akid=6687%2E582294%2EeXg06m)**

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Chris Pappas for Senate

Manchester, NH 03105

name: JD Vance
subject: I’m trying to reach Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
| | [](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/finihttps://secure.winred.com/rnc/budget-shortfall-jdv-v1-30892439?utm_medium=email&utm_source=30892439_email&utm_campaign=20260424_bc000966_budget-shortfall-jdv-v1-30892439_gop_rnc&utm_content=%22%3E%3Cimg+alt%3D%22&__cf_chl_rt_tk=AKI83a8UGt_RkHb1wgl2Z8Nwv_x3iPHe5IOPEf_tlu8-1779029294-1.0.1.1-UMvwRanHOggPi5lXDTZUZSHOuu1e8iE4kAN_FNSfGMUsh-your-donation&xuno=524e4331383735&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02009801PRIVATE MESSAGE FROM JD VANCE)

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: What equality means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131568773/621559440/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmJhOGMyNy0wMTUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vcf47m4M4lPt59ERpMNsLE5p2x8Dgt0WirVLNkXGu_M=)

Peter,

The word “equality” has become so politicized lately that I sometimes think we've forgotten how simple the idea really is. I wanted to tell you what it means to me.

On the first day of every class, I tell my students that I will respect their viewpoints and that I want us to have robust yet respectful debates in our classroom. Law school is full of people with different perspectives, backgrounds, and beliefs, and that's a good thing. What matters to me is making sure every student knows their voice matters and feels empowered to speak up.

**As a professor, I see it as my responsibility to create an environment where everyone has the opportunity to work hard and succeed.** That's exactly how I think government should work, too.

I want everyone in our district, no matter where they come from or what path they're on, to have the opportunity to build a good life and feel at home here. I see equality as a fair shot. It means making housing more affordable, lowering everyday costs, strengthening public education, protecting freedom of speech, and making sure people can actually be heard by those in power.

**Some politicians like Mariannette Miller-Meeks treat equality and opportunity like it’s a chocolate cream pie with only so many slices to go around.** They act like helping one family somehow hurts another. Like giving someone support during a hard time is taking something away from somebody else.

I just don't believe that. I believe when people are doing well, communities do well. When healthcare is affordable, we are all healthier. When schools are strong, all of our futures are stronger. When workers can succeed, our entire economy benefits. **We are not stronger when we divide people against each other. We are stronger when we lift each other up.**

**[That's the kind of campaign I'm running, and it's the kind of leadership I want to bring to Congress. If you believe we're better together than divided, I hope you'll add your name and commit to telling three people about this campaign and our vision for a district where everyone has the opportunity to thrive>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131568782/621559451/1892230304?ms=em26_260517_equali_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em26_260517_equali_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em26_260517_equali_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260517_equali_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=30YftpYpTdr5tH/GOFKP9Pk70/ZL7c+tApUhADfhWucnJcNHvQXlh0Nou9V2iKqh+ifamZc9lzedAVT9CHoQ0Cn3s7KwscRyWBa/ytxzjvT+0D8mMV39IAwjbXwZm+dvQ7POH2f20Ezce7hQ4Lsd0m+j3QhkOI2myuUVXW6YuTU=&refcode2=6fba8c27-0152-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmJhOGMyNy0wMTUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vcf47m4M4lPt59ERpMNsLE5p2x8Dgt0WirVLNkXGu_M=&emci=1ebe5347-ed4e-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=6fba8c27-0152-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=13891890)**

clean_body: We're slipping | | | = The GOP attacks are working. This is an urgent situation, and we need everyone on the same page as we fight back. = | | = Here's what's going on: First , our momentum was surging, Sherrod officially won the primary, and The Cook Political Report and Inside Elections moved this race even further in our direction. But then , the GOP’s top super PAC announced they would spend $79 million in Ohio to stop us – the most of any state. They went live with their first attacks against Sherrod, and immediately after, Sherrod’s opponent went on offense too. Now, we're falling behind. The GOP strategy is working. The New York Times is reporting a new poll that has us slipping 3 points behind our opponent. And we’re getting reports that we’re losing ground with persuadable voters. We know the passion of this grassroots team – and we wouldn't ask if we didn't have to – but we can't do this alone. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Sherrod = Personal message from Sherrod: I didn’t plan on running for office again. But when I saw how these guys in Washington are only looking out for their billionaire friends and special interests, I knew I had to get back in the fight. This grassroots movement is about fighting back against a rigged system that benefits the wealthy and well-connected, while working people pay the price. And we’ve got momentum: Experts increased our odds of winning and officially named Ohio as a key Senate race to watch, and two new polls show we have a slight lead over our opponent. But I need your help: Corporate special interests have already spent millions attacking me with misleading ads. The only way we can fight back and win in Ohio is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you. = If you'd like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text "OHIO" to 64054. The more people that join our campaign, the larger our movement grows. While my MAGA opponent has almost 70% of his donations coming from big checks, over 10,000 small-dollar donors have already joined our people-powered campaign. That’s HUGE, because every donation, no matter how small, sends an important message about the widespread support we’re receiving.
We need to keep our momentum going strong heading into our critical mid-quarter of our FEC deadline. Mike Johnson, Dillan Vancil and their allies are hoping to see a slump, or anything they can seize as races around the country heat up. We need to remind them of what we're capable of.
National Republicans are already targeting IL-17. This is the most competitive district in the state, and we expect them to dump piles of cash into our district to install a Trump yes-man. Our ability to fight them off comes from individual donors like you.
[**So Peter, will you chip in $1 – or what you can – toward my campaign to keep IL-17 in the hands of the people? name: Amanda Sherman Baity, EMILYs List
subject: The Trump administration won’t stop attacking reproductive rights
body:
Women should be the ones making choices about their bodies. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131570135/621564070/-1080350292?refcode=WUEFEQ41_20260517_OzOppo_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1058788&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU1ZmM1Yi0wMjUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UlsWcIKvx9GmBL88ZDnWLVe-KfvJCxv8T9W25qHZpEs=) Peter, in case you missed it, a video circulated earlier this week of Dr. Oz in the Oval Office claiming that “one in three Americans are under-babied.”

Yes, you read that right: **_“Under-babied.”_**

Apparently, that means people are having fewer children than they should — according to Dr. Oz.

The term itself might sound absurd, but the mindset behind it is not. **It’s another reminder that Trump and his allies believe they should have a say in deeply personal decisions about pregnancies, families, and futures.** [**EMILYs List women are running for office all across the country to protect reproductive freedom and push back against dangerous anti-choice policies. Will you chip in today to help elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131570136/621564071/-1080350292?refcode=WUEFEQ41_20260517_OzOppo_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1058788&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU1ZmM1Yi0wMjUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UlsWcIKvx9GmBL88ZDnWLVe-KfvJCxv8T9W25qHZpEs=) | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131570137/621564072/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEQ41_20260517_OzOppo_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1058788&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU1ZmM1Yi0wMjUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UlsWcIKvx9GmBL88ZDnWLVe-KfvJCxv8T9W25qHZpEs=)
---
Let’s be clear: Trump and his cronies aren’t stopping at weird, offensive rhetoric.

Last year, Trump’s Secretary of Health and Human Services RFK Jr. ordered the FDA to review mifepristone — a safe, effective medication used in abortion care and miscarriage management — opening the door to new restrictions on medication abortion access. And in 2022, Trump’s handpicked U.S. Supreme Court majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , paving the way for abortion bans and other restrictions across the country.

Anti-choice Republicans have shown time and time again that they will go to extraordinary lengths to restrict reproductive freedom and control personal healthcare decisions. That’s why Dr. Oz’s comments are so dangerous: They’re not just bizarre — they’re part of the same anti-choice worldview that puts politicians, judges, and Trump allies between women and their own healthcare decisions.

**And that’s why electing Democratic pro-choice women has never been more important.**
[**Will you donate today to help EMILYs List women win critical races and defend reproductive rights nationwide?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131570138/621564073/-1080350292?refcode=WUEFEQ41_20260517_OzOppo_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1058788&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU1ZmM1Yi0wMjUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UlsWcIKvx9GmBL88ZDnWLVe-KfvJCxv8T9W25qHZpEs=)

clean_body: Women should be the ones making choices about their bodies. | = Peter, in case you missed it, a video circulated earlier this week of Dr. Oz in the Oval Office claiming that “one in three Americans are under-babied.” Yes, you read that right: “Under-babied.” Apparently, that means people are having fewer children than they should — according to Dr. Oz. The term itself might sound absurd, but the mindset behind it is not. It’s another reminder that Trump and his allies believe they should have a say in deeply personal decisions about pregnancies, families, and futures. = | = Let’s be clear: Trump and his cronies aren’t stopping at weird, offensive rhetoric. Last year, Trump’s Secretary of Health and Human Services RFK Jr. ordered the FDA to review mifepristone — a safe, effective medication used in abortion care and miscarriage management — opening the door to new restrictions on medication abortion access. And in 2022, Trump’s handpicked U.S. Supreme Court majority overturned Roe v. Wade , paving the way for abortion bans and other restrictions across the country. Anti-choice Republicans have shown time and time again that they will go to extraordinary lengths to restrict reproductive freedom and control personal healthcare decisions. That’s why Dr. Oz’s comments are so dangerous: They’re not just bizarre — they’re part of the same anti-choice worldview that puts politicians, judges, and Trump allies between women and their own healthcare decisions. And that’s why electing Democratic pro-choice women has never been more important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, Peter. We should be the ones making choices about our own bodies — not MAGA cronies like Dr. Oz. Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: This is James’ birthday wish:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
$37. That’s the donation we are asking everyone to make in honor of James turning 37 today!
**[If you want to wish James a happy birthday and help take back Texas, you can use this link to add $37 or whatever amount you can spare for our movement today!](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260517-1-ak&t=1&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $37](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2287?c0=jt-em-2026q2.rWTWUN&refcode=em260517-1-ak&t=2&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)**
---
****
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q2.Ou1HIv&refcode=em260517-1-ak&t=3&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)**
---
****
When James was elected to the Texas House, he was the youngest member at the time, and when we elect him to the U.S. Senate in November, he would once again be the youngest member in the chamber.
This is a moment that demands a new generation of leadership, and James is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat and elect the fighter we need.
Look... we know you’re not supposed to share your birthday wish, but it’s probably pretty obvious what James will be thinking about when he blows out the candles later today: taking back Texas for the people.
There would be no greater gift in his mind than building a movement that can finally end 30 years of one-party rule in Texas. It would be historic.
The last time a Democrat won statewide in Texas was when James was five years old. There is no playbook for doing something as tough as this.
But this year, our movement has the chance to change that and build a new politics right here in Texas. We are in a strong position, and today, you can help us celebrate James and put us one step closer to victory.
**[Please consider making a donation of $37 or whatever you can afford to celebrate James Talarico’s 37th birthday. We’re going to send him a list of everyone who donates, and it would mean a lot to him to see as many people as possible on that list.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260517-1-ak&t=4&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $37](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2287?c0=jt-em-2026q2.rWTWUN&refcode=em260517-1-ak&t=5&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)**
---
****
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q2.Ou1HIv&refcode=em260517-1-ak&t=6&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)**
---
****
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=7&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=8&refcode2=645_1347274_fvwEiJ&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=645%2E1347274%2EfvwEiJ).

This is a moment that demands a new generation of leadership, and James is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat and elect the fighter we need. Look... we know you’re not supposed to share your birthday wish, but it’s probably pretty obvious what James will be thinking about when he blows out the candles later today: taking back Texas for the people. There would be no greater gift in his mind than building a movement that can finally end 30 years of one-party rule in Texas. It would be historic. The last time a Democrat won statewide in Texas was when James was five years old. There is no playbook for doing something as tough as this. But this year, our movement has the chance to change that and build a new politics right here in Texas. We are in a strong position, and today, you can help us celebrate James and put us one step closer to victory. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** Team Talarico Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2OTBYvkkUSRmqrKgqory9gDsQp2hIH3-xVV3wd0Nzo6M9Lc-_NhHjaMIQ7f7YS124KZs-nmEIfPVxoxpwknzNkOIQ6dNcBAUVZSrnePF752XgkosOZaH5lgR4DiVQuhQWEPaL2stOhBasmErTwD1guvi1Dvl1jJNS95yY8H51XvuqrXVQdaoiWSrW9vF8wHl2LGebNL2DDEmPYpxYNLUzHWr2V5ZyJOBK4ErhndOuPBRvRp2Q0C1262G9Iupd-ZwBU0L8FBRX2JispOSlpxVVEsO60U6r46ciKu6zKZnNbZIRHNubnR56UloHY8oQ_rRERzefwjzk5vG4ZIRAMMSiY5M-fmZs7PU3sx99vtF5TfzPPSmh8n-tHev9ZSXDAuRDQf7Z1-5VHMtX9_hnEMWWki2TDZMP59dvn_erYa_gQAAP__GM-YKQ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2OTBYvkkUSRmqrKgqory9gDsQp2hIH3-xVV3wd0Nzo6M9Lc-_NhHjaMIQ7f7YS124KZs-nmEIfPVxoxpwknzNkOIQ6dNcBAUVZSrnePF752XgkosOZaH5lgR4DiVQuhQWEPaL2stOhBasmErTwD1guvi1Dvl1jJNS95yY8H51XvuqrXVQdaoiWSrW9vF8wHl2LGebNL2DDEmPYpxYNLUzHWr2V5ZyJOBK4ErhndOuPBRvRp2Q0C1262G9Iupd-ZwBU0L8FBRX2JispOSlpxVVEsO60U6r46ciKu6zKZnNbZIRHNubnR56UloHY8oQ_rRERzefwjzk5vG4ZIRAMMSiY5M-fmZs7PU3sx99vtF5TfzPPSmh8n-tHev9ZSXDAuRDQf7Z1-5VHMtX9_hnEMWWki2TDZMP59dvn_erYa_gQAAP__GM-YKQ)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2OTBYvkkUSRmqrKgqory9gDsQp2hIH3-xVV3wd0Nzo6M9Lc-_NhHjaMIQ7f7YS124KZs-nmEIfPVxoxpwknzNkOIQ6dNcBAUVZSrnePF752XgkosOZaH5lgR4DiVQuhQWEPaL2stOhBasmErTwD1guvi1Dvl1jJNS95yY8H51XvuqrXVQdaoiWSrW9vF8wHl2LGebNL2DDEmPYpxYNLUzHWr2V5ZyJOBK4ErhndOuPBRvRp2Q0C1262G9Iupd-ZwBU0L8FBRX2JispOSlpxVVEsO60U6r46ciKu6zKZnNbZIRHNubnR56UloHY8oQ_rRERzefwjzk5vG4ZIRAMMSiY5M-fmZs7PU3sx99vtF5TfzPPSmh8n-tHev9ZSXDAuRDQf7Z1-5VHMtX9_hnEMWWki2TDZMP59dvn_erYa_gQAAP__GM-YKQ) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2OTBYvkkUSRmqrKgqory9gDsQp2hIH3-xVV3wd0Nzo6M9Lc-_NhHjaMIQ7f7YS124KZs-nmEIfPVxoxpwknzNkOIQ6dNcBAUVZSrnePF752XgkosOZaH5lgR4DiVQuhQWEPaL2stOhBasmErTwD1guvi1Dvl1jJNS95yY8H51XvuqrXVQdaoiWSrW9vF8wHl2LGebNL2DDEmPYpxYNLUzHWr2V5ZyJOBK4ErhndOuPBRvRp2Q0C1262G9Iupd-ZwBU0L8FBRX2JispOSlpxVVEsO60U6r46ciKu6zKZnNbZIRHNubnR56UloHY8oQ_rRERzefwjzk5vG4ZIRAMMSiY5M-fmZs7PU3sx99vtF5TfzPPSmh8n-tHev9ZSXDAuRDQf7Z1-5VHMtX9_hnEMWWki2TDZMP59dvn_erYa_gQAAP__GM-YKQ)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2OTBYvkkUSRmqrKgqory9gDsQp2hIH3-xVV3wd0Nzo6M9Lc-_NhHjaMIQ7f7YS124KZs-nmEIfPVxoxpwknzNkOIQ6dNcBAUVZSrnePF752XgkosOZaH5lgR4DiVQuhQWEPaL2stOhBasmErTwD1guvi1Dvl1jJNS95yY8H51XvuqrXVQdaoiWSrW9vF8wHl2LGebNL2DDEmPYpxYNLUzHWr2V5ZyJOBK4ErhndOuPBRvRp2Q0C1262G9Iupd-ZwBU0L8FBRX2JispOSlpxVVEsO60U6r46ciKu6zKZnNbZIRHNubnR56UloHY8oQ_rRERzefwjzk5vG4ZIRAMMSiY5M-fmZs7PU3sx99vtF5TfzPPSmh8n-tHev9ZSXDAuRDQf7Z1-5VHMtX9_hnEMWWki2TDZMP59dvn_erYa_gQAAP__GM-YKQ)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

Peter Willis,

In New York City, another fierce battle is unfolding between a progressive
champion and an ultra-wealthy member of the Democratic establishment –
this time for Congress.

Brad Lander is backed by Our Revolution, Bernie, and Zohran Mamdani. As
NYC Comptroller he’s taken on the corporate landlords fueling the housing
crisis, demanded the city divest from fossil fuels, and fought
relentlessly for workers’ rights. And now Lander is running against
AIPAC-backed Dan Goldman, heir to the Levi’s fortune, for Congress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/38205?source=email-20260517&t=1061&akid=10740%2E5885482%2EZX2gcc ]Photo of Brad Lander with Zohran Mamdani

We’ve seen this playbook before. Last year, Our Revolution helped mobilize
the grassroots and power Zohran Mamdani’s campaign to victory – defeating
a tidal wave of outside spending with small-dollar donations and people
power. And now we’re doing it again.

Goldman is flush with cash from millionaires and dark money super PACs. He
REFUSED to accept Lander’s challenge to take the pledge to keep big money
out of this race. And now his campaign just reported raising $2.3 million
in three months – three times what Lander has been able to raise.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/38205?source=email-20260517&t=1060&akid=10740%2E5885482%2EZX2gcc ]Headline: Dan Goldman outraises Brad Lander by three times in first
quarter.

But what he DOESN’T have is the grassroots momentum. Lander has the
support of the movement that Mamdani started last year – and now Our
Revolution is ready to take that energy and help translate it into victory
over the establishment – hitting the phones and the streets to get out the
vote. And just like with Mamdani’s race, even if you’re not in NYC, we
need our nationwide movement coming together to help us win these key
races.

Because the truth is this race isn’t just about one district – it’s about
whether movements like ours can take on the political establishment and
dark money and win. When Mamdani ran, pundits said he didn’t stand a
chance, but we proved them wrong. We did it with more doors knocked, more
conversations had, and more small-dollar donations than any super PAC
could buy.

We can do it again. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/38204?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20260517nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10740%2E5885482%2EZX2gcc ]Chip in $5, $27, or whatever you can right now to help power Brad Lander’s
grassroots campaign to take on the establishment – and win!

When we organize, we win.

Brad Lander is backed by Our Revolution, Bernie, and Zohran Mamdani. As NYC Comptroller he’s taken on the corporate landlords fueling the housing crisis, demanded the city divest from fossil fuels, and fought relentlessly for workers’ rights. And now Lander is running against AIPAC-backed Dan Goldman, heir to the Levi’s fortune, for Congress. [ ]Photo of Brad Lander with Zohran Mamdani We’ve seen this playbook before. name: Susan Collins
subject: Protecting Maine's proud defense heritage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Stand with me today to protect our defense

|
---
Peter,
Maine has a long, proud tradition of supporting our armed forces and building the ships that keep our nation safe. I have always believed that a strong defense is the foundation of a peaceful and secure America.
Recently, my opponent, Graham Platner, suggested cutting our national defense budget in half. While we all want a peaceful world, drastically reducing support for our military would leave our country vulnerable and deeply impact the hardworking men and women in Maine who contribute so much to our national security.
As Chair of the Senate Appropriations Committee, I am committed to a thoughtful, balanced approach that ensures our service members have the resources they need. I will always stand up for Maine's shipbuilders, our veterans, and the safety of our communities.
We need steady, experienced leadership to protect what makes our country strong. I hope you will join me in supporting our troops and defending Maine's vital role in our national security.
[Please stand with me today to protect our defense by chipping in $5, $10, or $15 today!](https://trk.emails.stayinformednow._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQ1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUxN19HUC01Qi4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4OTg0MzEtMTE0MiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNjA1MTdfR1AtNUIuMTE0NTEwX3QxODk4NDMxLTExNDImeGlkPVYxLnA0OXNBemZPNmlacnFxUnZMQWJpcktCQ2RmaFR4dGtMNG5XdWVXYk0yR1VjVDRwVVB3NmtRek5JYVRnSGtmRmYifQ/hVSNDhW8BgFnsEYk3DVBKA)

clean_body: Stand with me today to protect our defense | Peter, Maine has a long, proud tradition of supporting our armed forces and building the ships that keep our nation safe. I have always believed that a strong defense is the foundation of a peaceful and secure America. Recently, my opponent, Graham Platner, suggested cutting our national defense budget in half. While we all want a peaceful world, drastically reducing support for our military would leave our country vulnerable and deeply impact the hardworking men and women in Maine who contribute so much to our national security. As Chair of the Senate Appropriations Committee, I am committed to a thoughtful, balanced approach that ensures our service members have the resources they need. I will always stand up for Maine's shipbuilders, our veterans, and the safety of our communities. We need steady, experienced leadership to protect what makes our country strong. I hope you will join me in supporting our troops and defending Maine's vital role in our national security. | | | | Right now, our opponents and outside special interest groups are pouring money into Maine, flooding the digital airwaves with attacks designed to distort Susan's record of independent leadership. name: Paige Cognetti
subject: I won’t tolerate corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paige for PA**
body:
My primary is in 2 days | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131571598/621569507/-1967260413?refcode=5.17.26_og_fr_primarybio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODY2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjEwZDllNi0wNTUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI_mMpmTrlHoAJJIJ7BfiMNy67wBnkJ09thSiJoTcK0=)
---
Peter, Too many politicians treat public office like a way to enrich themselves. It’s why I first ran for Mayor, and it’s why I’m running for Congress now — I refuse to raise my daughters in a country where public corruption is okay. My primary to become the nominee to defeat Rob Bresnahan is in just two days, so [**I’m reaching out to ask for your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131571599/621569508/1139927205?amount=10&refcode=5.17.26_og_fr_primarybio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODY2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjEwZDllNi0wNTUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI_mMpmTrlHoAJJIJ7BfiMNy67wBnkJ09thSiJoTcK0=) Here’s why: I ran for mayor as an independent to clean up a culture of corruption in Scranton. I took on the machine and won. I was eight months pregnant when I beat the establishment, and I became the first woman ever elected mayor of our city because people wanted real reform, not more cronyism. As mayor, I turned words into action. I turned down the city car. I eliminated cash payments so there was no hiding money. I cut waste and balanced budgets, moving us from junk bond status to investment grade. I secured more than $155 million in federal and state grants to rebuild our neighborhoods. I streamlined permitting, cut red tape, and facilitated over thousand more homes, I put more cops on the beat and invested in technology and training that actually keeps people safe. **I’ve spent my career uncovering corruption and making government work for the people it serves.** That’s why I won’t take corporate PAC money. Washington is broken because too many members take orders from special interests. I’ll bring the same reform and accountability to Congress that I brought to Scranton. [**But we can’t do this without resources. My primary is in just 2 days, and our fundraising limits reset that night. If we want to keep outraising Rob Bresnahan and build the campaign to flip this seat in November, we have to move now. Can you chip in to help us keep the pressure on?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131571600/621569509/1139927205?amount=10&refcode=5.17.26_og_fr_primarybio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODY2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjEwZDllNi0wNTUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI_mMpmTrlHoAJJIJ7BfiMNy67wBnkJ09thSiJoTcK0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131571601/621569510/-1967260413?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=5.17.26_og_fr_primarybio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODY2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjEwZDllNi0wNTUyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI_mMpmTrlHoAJJIJ7BfiMNy67wBnkJ09thSiJoTcK0=)
