name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> May 17, 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...

| | | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-2A)
---
| | | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Cruz Pushes Forward On Kids' Safety Package:](https://trk.email.tedcruz._1z8tw)** "Senate Commerce Committee Chair Ted Cruz wants to advance a package in the next month that would impose new online protections for children, he told reporters Wednesday. The new proposed timeline comes after the Texas Republican said at a Capitol Hill rally for online safety Tuesday that a bill providing greater oversight for how children interact with AI chatbots would be part of this package. Cruz told reporters in mid-March that he wanted to put legislation forward by roughly the end of April that includes the Kids Online Safety Act (KOSA), Children and Teens' Online Privacy..." **[Cruz, Cantwell Welcome NASA Artemis II Crew:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Senate Commerce Committee Chairman Ted Cruz (R-Texas) and Ranking Member Maria Cantwell (D-Wash.) today welcomed the NASA Artemis II crew to Capitol Hill. Committee members had the opportunity to meet the crew and ask questions regarding their 10-day mission around the moon, which set a record for the furthest distance traveled by humans into deep space. During the event, Chairman Cruz said: "Artemis II wasn't simply a successful mission - it was proof that this nation still has extraordinary talent, the capability, and the resolve to do hard things at the very..." **[Cruz, Durbin Lead Senate Efforts Urging Trump To Free 5 China Prisoners:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-D8Y0Zg)** "Texas Republican Sen. Ted Cruz and his Democratic Illinois counterpart led a bipartisan Senate resolution that passed, calling for President Donald Trump to secure the release of several political prisoners in China. In a Senate resolution that passed Thursday, May 13, with unanimous consent, calls for Trump to prioritize securing the release of political prisoners during his current visit to China, including Pastor Jin Mingri, Pastor Gao Quanfu and his wife, Pang Yu, Dr. Gulshan Abbas and Jimmy Lai. "The Chinese Communist Party is an authoritarian regime..." **[Cruz Calls Ocasio-Cortez'Parasite Sucking On The Taxpayer' Over Billionaire Remarks:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) on Monday called progressive firebrand Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) a "parasite sucking on the taxpayer" after she claimed that Americans "can't earn" to become billionaires. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Just for a second. Enough to remind you — your bank account isn’t as untouchable as you think. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Small-town dad at an ATM. Friend, Yesterday, thousands of Americans protested against Republican lawmakers’ actions to steal this year’s mid-term elections and steal Black Southerners’ votes. The All Roads Lead to the South national day of action was a powerful reminder of not only what we’re fighting against, but also what we’re fighting for: a truly multiracial democracy where everyone has an equal say in the political systems that affect their lives. **We all have the right to fair representation in Congress** , and we have tools to stop Republicans’ anti-Black and unconstitutional power grab. For example, my colleagues and I have introduced multiple laws in Congress that would strengthen our voting rights and protections against racial discrimination. [**Demand Congress pass legislation to re-enforce our constitutional right to vote.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTL0HEe2DtH5eJBlrkUepzlNluYqtWJSowFk5C9NCe2AlpbOvfNU2WllYES4f2bs5k2se2hLoBp1ykkgoVr7_FDKyCgrBcla31-hHSSL9W0qMoB-Y9iMPEKcfLXbwD1p7B4iUbhxaMqUkJG3Sj5rgwyvmtw69m6o_c3tUS4A8dItzs_QTEXMgZwYgTFYa7RzWGKF5KzoQxtKPRSXnPUu8DE1zHovJ6tdR0syTDwkB2TD3PDscY8kB2OLGHdtDupz5G0fkinEeVo2WTKvZLf8lV5EoTp5EjtG5rj1tZxmHQQWTBljIc1f9avzAPDybyxxKWDsZrarVZRTAW9_VtRHg2lTxe63j3Bj6L_qWXp2ZgFM6Ot-OHsFLDR3G27nvdTIIVw/4qp/xVYEuAlrR1Gc7voKMFgJgQ/h1/h001.7ESxScxZin7I2cZ3UozIX6ymSw42ARrEX6ZgLixsLGE) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTL0HEe2DtH5eJBlrkUepzlNluYqtWJSowFk5C9NCe2AlpbOvfNU2WllYES4f2bs5kzs7Z6jjSfKSLJ7eP-5zcLxJ9Q6pvcWRltV7lrh9PlcMUuFdA707KvE_2GKirFiCa6kv4WjncG4UXWsJClwF2bc88G41jfht5k7Lk56w9bRPROTvSb3f2Da2fi22gulMOg9p3DrK4BdnoAg9e4H4k8I8k4B4Glr9bmjgnr3eiqN5PJdNIoDVjMiIEmykxaOm6VtDY2NlXyR6KYOAumJKz2_lRFQ5sIRnmFkt2iQFtRpF-EeMithlMDzul2ffv8QBsFjWy1Q6xYWBDsDdWCCZAs4eZ7x_VyH47aeNkMgFww9wJ-u8vG0Px3VWNz0kFwyLfA/4qp/xVYEuAlrR1Gc7voKMFgJgQ/h2/h001.KCcoJMteFLcCsuiutkKcZ2DjebxugsjxiyAjpvD_iBk)

The anti-democratic Supreme Court just stripped away the Voting Rights Act’s core protections against racist voter suppression, and already Republicans in Louisiana and Alabama have pushed back primary elections that were scheduled for this Tuesday.
**One in three residents of Alabama and Louisiana are Black. Even though many voters have already cast their ballots, state lawmakers are changing the very districts people vote in, in order to cut their states’ majority-Black districts in half.**
When voting to eliminate the state’s only majority-Black congressional district, Tennessee’s GOP legislators also repealed a rule that required the state to notify voters when their districts and polling places change—so residents won’t even know where to vote.
And Florida passed a new map to cut the state’s Democratic districts in half.
**This is blatant discrimination that violates our Constitution.**
We have constitutional rights to vote, to have proportional representation in the U.S. House of Representatives, and to be treated equally under the law. Laws like the Voting Rights Act have helped us enforce these protections, and now we need to pass new laws.
[**As soon as possible, Congress must pass legislation to restore and expand the Voting Rights Act’s nationwide protections. Please sign on if you agree.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTL0HEe2DtH5eJBlrkUepzlNluYqtWJSowFk5C9NCe2AlpbOvfNU2WllYES4f2bs5kwPIubUbhb-dr30Y8HL4Tc5ayY3gI38FOXL8gXlwQfq6BOT2b46jX6Ar_AbYUyS0PMW8O11zBsVh-0jSE6DBbrP6DcbrOPKLjSPKzHqcMMjAxlATv1tQl9njpe6uOeVmXEEIC3iJg5RT6U1pWe1N3my-riGJb7yCwvL3Nl4g055VI_RVHUnPwzIFt3Oy_p_zA2TvuJ0AH2eb_Lxm76uqpZVKfA9aECgW9tRZslNaeX5NKVWxs4G1RTOlgCc60SHYhzPPshMczb6zjUIZFlBiYfKJz3EMGT1dDnWByVpl78yd27NM1jbOaZLY2IVBvxSM_A/4qp/xVYEuAlrR1Gc7voKMFgJgQ/h3/h001.DSqtOrtBWP6CY_91upJDGI3Kd5eYdtSi6fdCSlMOv54)
We must pass policies like the **Fair Representation Act** , which is a major way to counteract the Supreme Court’s ruling. It would:
* Require congressional redistricting processes comply with the Voting Rights Act and the Constitution
* Prohibit any redistricting that has the intent or effect of favoring or disfavoring any political party—such as these new district maps
* Ban mid-decade redistricting, the kind of redistricting that’s happening right now. Usually this only happens once every ten years after the census, not within weeks!

I’ve also cosponsored the **John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act,** the **Expanding the VOTE Act** , the **Universal Right To Vote by Mail Act** , the **Vote at Home Act** , the **Time Off to Vote Act** , and the **Youth Voting Rights Act**.
If passed, these bills would prohibit last-minute voting changes and expand access to voting, voting materials, and voter registration. They’re important tools to stop Trump and others’ attacks on our elections.
I’ve also introduced the**Defend the Fourteenth Amendment Resolution** to reaffirm and recognize the Fourteenth Amendment to the U.S. Constitution, which established citizenship for formerly enslaved people (granting them the right to vote), and guaranteed due process and equal protection under the law.
**The Fourteenth Amendment is a crucial tool for our fight for true equity.** Many of the lawsuits to block these new maps are using it as a legal foundation to sue.
That’s why Republicans don’t like it, and why a Southern GOP lawmaker recently said in public that he wanted the Supreme Court to overturn the Fourteenth Amendment. They’re not hiding their discrimination.
My **Justice for All Act** would also counteract part of the Supreme Court’s recent _Louisiana v. Callais_ ruling, which discredited the discriminatory _impact_ of electoral maps, saying that only discriminatory _intent_ matters.
White Republicans’ intent is clear, but it’s extremely difficult to prove in court. To get more power in the courts, we must reaffirm discrimination claims based on disparate _impact_ , not just _intent_. The**** Justice for All Act would do just that, and restore the original intent of many civil rights laws.
[**Please sign to demand Congress pass bills to affirm and enforce our right to vote, including the Fair Representation Act, the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, the Justice for All Act, and the Defend the Fourteenth Amendment Resolution.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTL0HEe2DtH5eJBlrkUepzlNluYqtWJSowFk5C9NCe2AlpbOvfNU2WllYES4f2bs5k0GBJ_2qmi0rytB6sh9r5XnxfASLzWnYsSZy_Qff0ZFWtOqdW9_4ZfiMdzVP07Vquil6fBYY485Q0d138HtTiIh_5nuQOVCm0x8Db6_-mTs-4KHBXABf1lalH_MfqLlIrlMU6AbDDx_JkduZaoZ4OJVeb3j-Ku9CCd5iJMmXoTQVRWKFtCaVTqcpyc9mWKdp0VIb4iHYuKTOhvZliunV0Ku-9e9FH3UVtrQ2cUZEPXJS6PY-KZncrl2uZeA4maJAQydLTJagcmlb_PC7lNcx_CvLrHer0ZhgYvF0rACdXK65wATe2-nKRh1IgyG6fV4eDw/4qp/xVYEuAlrR1Gc7voKMFgJgQ/h4/h001.lJTVoLgDTp5MbHJl6d_MqsyVzT3NjaQ77mIxsexi5oo)

_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2282%2E259176%2EDoLXgE) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2282%2E259176%2EDoLXgE)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12644?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Haaland-Attack-Ads_B2_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2282%2E259176%2EDoLXgE) This is urgent, Peter: The first vicious attack ad of the cycle was launched against me and it is full of lies and misinformation to sway voters and tear down our momentum. If we don't fight back ASAP, it could cost us this race. [**Could you please rush a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action now to keep New Mexico blue?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12644?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Haaland-Attack-Ads_B2_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2282%2E259176%2EDoLXgE) | [DONATE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12644?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Haaland-Attack-Ads_B2_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2282%2E259176%2EDoLXgE)

It has never been more essential, Peter, to ensure New Mexico has a Democratic governor. Trump has reiterated how much power, not people, is his priority. He’s willing to continue an illegal war at the expense of your Medicare, Medicaid, and childcare.
They know if I’m in office, I’ll stop them. That’s exactly why they’re coming after me now.
This attack ad comes on top of reports saying that our race in New Mexico is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans. They're gearing up to spend MILLIONS to buy this seat and bring their extremist agenda into our state — _all because they know governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power._
And now, a massive smear campaign is live on the airwaves because it's the only way they think they can win. But with our rights, freedoms, and communities on the line, I refuse to back down without a fight.
That's why my team and I just set a $15,000 rapid-response goal to ensure we have the money to fight back against these lies, and I'm personally asking for your grassroots support to help us reach it before midnight tonight.
[**Will you please rush a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action now to help me fight back, win in November, and keep New Mexico blue?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12644?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Haaland-Attack-Ads_B2_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=7&akid=2282%2E259176%2EDoLXgE)

Be fierce,
Deb

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

clean_body: | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates, If you'd like to unsubscribe, This is urgent, Peter: The first vicious attack ad of the cycle was launched against me and it is full of lies and misinformation to sway voters and tear down our momentum. If we don't fight back ASAP, it could cost us this race. | It has never been more essential, Peter, to ensure New Mexico has a Democratic governor. Trump has reiterated how much power, not people, is his priority. He’s willing to continue an illegal war at the expense of your Medicare, Medicaid, and childcare. They know if I’m in office, I’ll stop them. That’s exactly why they’re coming after me now. This attack ad comes on top of reports saying that our race in New Mexico is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans. They're gearing up to spend MILLIONS to buy this seat and bring their extremist agenda into our state — all because they know governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power. And now, a massive smear campaign is live on the airwaves because it's the only way they think they can win. But with our rights, freedoms, and communities on the line, I refuse to back down without a fight. That's why my team and I just set a $15,000 rapid-response goal to ensure we have the money to fight back against these lies, and I'm personally asking for your grassroots support to help us reach it before midnight tonight. Be fierce, Deb | We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world. Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations. The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | |

This year, the stakes couldn't be higher. The funds raised at this year's event will help Republicans: ✅ Take back the corner office ✅ Support candidates up and down the ballot ✅ Build the grassroots energy needed to compete and WIN.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: It falls on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA]
body:
[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/711?t=1001&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Josh Shapiro

Derek, I like to
think of myself as a pretty optimistic person. And even on the toughest
days of this campaign, it’s the thought of continuing to get stuff done
for the good people of Pennsylvania that keeps me going:

Creating jobs. Protecting our freedoms. Giving our kids a better future.

But Derek, it’s my
responsibility to remember the negative consequences as well. I know it’s
not fun to think about — but all of us need to know exactly what’s at
stake.

If Pennsylvania elects a far-right Governor this year, our Commonwealth’s
last line of defense will fall. The GOP could even win control of both
houses of the Pennsylvania Legislature.

If that happens? Our Commonwealth could turn into a mirror of Washington’s
chaos and cruelty.

That’s why I’m giving this election everything I’ve got,
Derek. No off days. No second
chances.

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/711?t=1002&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]It’s going to take all of us working together and doing our part to
keep Pennsylvania moving forward — so I’m humbly asking: Will you make a
donation of any size before Tuesday’s primary election? We need to raise
$25,000 before the polls close to hit our pre-primary fundraising goal,
and we can’t get it done without the help of folks like you.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/712?t=1003&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Donate $5 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/713?t=1004&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Donate $15 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/714?t=1005&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Donate $25 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/715?t=1006&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Donate $50 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/716?t=1007&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Donate $100 →

[ https://act.joshshapiro.org/go/711?t=1008&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs ]Other →

This won’t be an easy election. Far from it. But with a team like this, I
know we can get it done.

Josh Shapiro

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
Unsubscribe: https://act.joshshapiro.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=44%2E245147%2Ei1OlEs

name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: This is what the Left doesn’t want us doing...
body:
The future of America’s young women is being decided now
For years, the Left thought they had a permanent grip on America's youth.

| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=53a3ff0eef944123a68190c197efb6d0&_e=m0G-1y9G_kT5px8cIJ5uV0EToDoL9FRKdTLu_W7ajtCH2cjGEHtMcdC_SVlUGKfgp1ACxtMbNkHnWMfmGSJ8sM6EeCLqMnb4QXRwPk_Q_TK7NjddOXpeB7X9JjL6fbAjMCBz-GlRAK2-lec3nPpTnnIUe1YqS7H4K2pjXLpt8-vFHOhcpos5mjcoyPssmn9YE8aG99nxeMLo0lV43c008J1crokfuyeM2fQNVpeij6v-vWgFU5wfx_2e1-u1_sOX0-syQb5EUEalnnzZpk1U-tO1iJUriSicpiPoh-jgr7KgUPALX_S1Le5Uv_rsDjU3jLLhW-ArlnWLy-4nb5j65iO6DwulwJaxWQ0ifhpGpRSXA9aDZ4b4mTO2vBVomuGHR7YIevDVkjL67Nd7vesgaQ6V34zLvzrcNGEfOA2ZNGoNwc8hJaCB7mrYiBC3v5a3ULtf9QjH458jSTw48xuG5VWT3SaT6qShTr_IGoqfIvRle4MKHWv5q3YOPD6BWdV2aWcszHlQCnJi946Bn0V8jfNiiMwqruNMRbjf7Xh3Go2eVTsLPhLvRmdBxuFf1w--eoqZH7H3tBmUVhvManlkMww3UGozROowAsBp4LTtY0B6qYBO9rgar3Bo20EQIyPKYb_tpiFh7p2AkZtS4i8ViwpzOzDcOnqHpdVVHQ1vHcryDFhag1tUXRKHr1iqvKPB)
---
| | | Friend,
---
For years, the Left thought they had a permanent grip on America's youth.

And honestly?

For a while, they did.
They dominated classrooms. Social media. Pop culture. Hollywood. Universities.

They told an entire generation that loving your country was shameful...

That faith was outdated... And traditional values were something to erase.

But thanks to Charlie's leadership, something incredible has happened:

Young men are rejecting the Left in RECORD numbers. High school boys are the most Conservative they've been in 50 years.

And Gen Z is heading back to church -- in numbers greater than their parents' or grandparents' generations.

For the first time in decades, we are WINNING the American Culture War.

**But there 's still one group the Left is desperately fighting to hold onto: **

_America 's young women. _

Because they know something very important, Friend...

If they can win the hearts and minds of young women...

They don't just shape individuals. They shape families. They shape homes. They shape future generations.

**And that 's exactly why Turning Point USA's Women's Leadership Summit (WLS) matters more than ever this year. **
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=53a3ff0eef944123a68190c197efb6d0&_e=m0G-1y9G_kT5px8cIJ5uV0EToDoL9FRKdTLu_W7ajtCH2cjGEHtMcdC_SVlUGKfgp1ACxtMbNkHnWMfmGSJ8sM6EeCLqMnb4QXRwPk_Q_TK7NjddOXpeB7X9JjL6fbAjMCBz-GlRAK2-lec3nPpTnnIUe1YqS7H4K2pjXLpt8-vFHOhcpos5mjcoyPssmn9YE8aG99nxeMLo0lV43c008J1crokfuyeM2fQNVpeij6scSMm-uFe-vpSKQF9EFw0HwaNYpWkTTV51V3e0tbKXBgFfu63BhFmyOM10VOnjEx_wsz-H39Su-6NC7albTHdKRc-_MpkvhS9u9KBvjipgfrhg66dPxAJdJ0AzV4DRDxyA5WEYWQYD5fstaaKVf7fq51zlhHPO9LBw0mL3W4wBv0Tp-R6wTS42A9ka8IZq6qmsZProMwiuzp0JxMNsoYjXNa92To8DHPOeuDN9bBZ-zr5PBau4TdFCNfuTe_KZZ1CLQ2Spf0jSLKiym-IDfRB_iAVsYBwfdQ3MwP89RNm5vnEIyRct5rw3RaS93sDxPi7Ev86rxTAkGUJy1_A1pgtuCBe6vJOHcMAeUqWgU87AljP0oK5lX9LbVxo1XMJZOBhPausPIqqCY1dwfy80qy_l8kHFCUk7XkM9kc_gg0ShswZgJ71wQyuTrZBQ3VNc5ctyswA8-76OutKyFGtypNkX)
---
I've spent the last 7 years helping lead the team behind Turning Point USA's biggest events.

And I can honestly tell you:

I've never seen young women hungrier for truth, purpose, faith, wellness, and real community than they are right now.

Because modern culture is failing them.

The Left sold them confusion and called it "empowerment."

They told young women: femininity is weakness, motherhood is oppression, faith is foolish, patriotism is toxic, and healthy living is extremism.

And after years of hearing those lies...

So many young women feel exhausted. Lonely. Anxious. Spiritually empty.

They're searching for something REAL.

Somewhere they can breathe again. Somewhere they can grow stronger instead of being torn down.

_That 's what Women's Leadership Summit has become. _

Not just another event... but a place where thousands of women come together to rediscover truth, confidence, purpose, and courage.

**From June 5 -7 in San Antonio, women from across the country will gather to: **

✅ Strengthen their minds
✅ Cultivate wellness
✅ Step boldly into their purpose
✅ Anchor their spirits in faith

And when they walk into that room... _Something changes. _
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=53a3ff0eef944123a68190c197efb6d0&_e=m0G-1y9G_kT5px8cIJ5uV0EToDoL9FRKdTLu_W7ajtCH2cjGEHtMcdC_SVlUGKfgp1ACxtMbNkHnWMfmGSJ8sM6EeCLqMnb4QXRwPk_Q_TK7NjddOXpeB7X9JjL6fbAjMCBz-GlRAK2-lec3nPpTnnIUe1YqS7H4K2pjXLpt8-vFHOhcpos5mjcoyPssmn9YE8aG99nxeMLo0lV43c008J1crokfuyeM2fQNVpeij6vF3TVQebZPIEMkBwou1Jr3RIRKg4gMr25fEUVLh41VWRDIX325CEXnE83AnJMGLGv_6dazdl98_Dip8XwK3K2weYP4nJE4Zi9j83TYtJQ7DUKMTv6XTCVgRrg3nDQCRwx451dwKUt_kIG8KiHj0LG-gDi3R6d2h02-MESI_log_hJolWL0eUIjr591lwtGIwqoM9WgtN04Xn5kA8numvXBw6gGEr-9IM5H5dczmUntkm29RTvT79vUbhrToSDKxvRytta8xfCogfHb98FcLdC2ACWZ_nrdxYStAsttZsgKypTXBiWd7xqUcGIPLQhUIlYh70xQL8u9q_AkFTHa5BwBP5gG6W-HDreowch2wvboh0PalAm4-OUunK8cjnxL5DecVUY_g8jQ7BtxB38aZ4BiEJyIyNFvTal75xA6sIoNsehW4XENS1zvq3g6sioqY6gkQJBj7TrQr92WxJFTgS_h)
---
Friend, I see it happen every year -- and from backstage, you can actually watch the change happen in real time.

Young women arriving unsure of themselves...

_Then leaving with fire in their eyes. _

Women who thought they were alone suddenly realizing:

_" There are thousands of other women who love God, love Freedom, and LOVE AMERICA just like I do." _

That matters.

Because the Left wants these young women isolated.

Disconnected. Demoralized. Easy to manipulate.

clean_body: The future of America’s young women is being decided now For years, the Left thought they had a permanent grip on America's youth. | | | | | | | Friend, For years, the Left thought they had a permanent grip on America's youth. And honestly? For a while, they did. They dominated classrooms. Social media. Pop culture. Hollywood. Universities. They told an entire generation that loving your country was shameful... That faith was outdated... And traditional values were something to erase. But thanks to Charlie's leadership, something incredible has happened: Young men are rejecting the Left in RECORD numbers. High school boys are the most Conservative they've been in 50 years. And Gen Z is heading back to church -- in numbers greater than their parents' or grandparents' generations. For the first time in decades, we are WINNING the American Culture War. But there 's still one group the Left is desperately fighting to hold onto: America 's young women. Because they know something very important, Friend... If they can win the hearts and minds of young women... They don't just shape individuals. They shape families. They shape homes. They shape future generations. And that 's exactly why Turning Point USA's Women's Leadership Summit (WLS) matters more than ever this year. I've spent the last 7 years helping lead the team behind Turning Point USA's biggest events. And I can honestly tell you: I've never seen young women hungrier for truth, purpose, faith, wellness, and real community than they are right now. Because modern culture is failing them. The Left sold them confusion and called it "empowerment." They told young women: femininity is weakness, motherhood is oppression, faith is foolish, patriotism is toxic, and healthy living is extremism. And after years of hearing those lies... So many young women feel exhausted. Lonely. Anxious. Spiritually empty. They're searching for something REAL. Somewhere they can breathe again. Somewhere they can grow stronger instead of being torn down. That 's what Women's Leadership Summit has become. Not just another event... but a place where thousands of women come together to rediscover truth, confidence, purpose, and courage. From June 5 -7 in San Antonio, women from across the country will gather to: ✅ Strengthen their minds ✅ Cultivate wellness ✅ Step boldly into their purpose ✅ Anchor their spirits in faith And when they walk into that room... Something changes. Friend, I see it happen every year -- and from backstage, you can actually watch the change happen in real time. Young women arriving unsure of themselves... Then leaving with fire in their eyes. Women who thought they were alone suddenly realizing: " There are thousands of other women who love God, love Freedom, and LOVE AMERICA just like I do." That matters. Because the Left wants these young women isolated. Disconnected. Demoralized. Easy to manipulate. But WLS reminds them they are part of something MUCH bigger. A movement. A sisterhood. A generation of strong, patriotic women rising up to reject the lies they 've been fed for years. And these women don't just leave inspired... They go home ready to LEAD. I've watched women leave WLS and: 🔥 Strengthen their faith 🔥 Embrace their femininity 🔥 Build friendships rooted in truth and purpose 🔥 Boldly speak out on their campuses 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters 🔥 Lead in their communities and in this movement This is how we WIN the culture war. One fearless young woman at a time. But here 's the problem, Friend... Right now, we have many young women who desperately want to attend WLS but may miss this life-changing experience without help. Some are students working to save enough money for gas or airfare. Others are trapped in environments where they constantly feel pressured to stay silent about their beliefs. And many just need ONE place where they can be surrounded by women who will encourage them, strengthen them, and remind them they were created for MORE. But there 's not much time left before the doors open... I truly believe Women's Leadership Summit can change the trajectory of a young woman's life... That's why I'm personally asking: For many young women, attending WLS is the moment everything starts to change. The moment they realize they are NOT alone. The moment they stop apologizing for loving God, loving freedom, and loving America. The moment they begin stepping boldly into the life and purpose they were created for. Because if we want to save this country... We MUST reach America 's young women before the Left does. That's the mission. And I believe with all my heart that the Women's Leadership Summit is a launching pad for the future mothers, leaders, creators, and culture-shapers who will determine where this country goes next. Please help us make sure no young woman is left behind. Let's fill San Antonio with women ready to LIVE boldly... Stand confidently in truth... LOVE AMERICA again... name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: He took money from firms he ruled on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Chief Justice’s wife made $10,323,842 from firms her husband ruled on. | |
---
Peter, **Whistleblower spreadsheets have revealed that Chief Justice John Roberts’ wife Jane took over $10 MILLION in commission from the very firms her husband was ruling on from his seat on the Supreme Court.****** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxMPguUoPI5DybRHO6PWVxY2POXfIE8sKpLl68fpE0vwil-HUxZxKp7qWICpXTa6_D1wXpbKbgXutUWg-W0PH0SlWe7AqekVocvigC_DEj1etpB4BpB7d8EXpd5b7uGt5VCriXluvCwnCGFdSAljTIdqTQbQ0R2DMfTDQfSrKS14OM7YVsmr0hdBJe-IdtAoLSLqd1ak-NcsdTqwjwVjYNV0fWyd4NNUXt-ubKINR5Bh6ZwDrybGLaEUnaKAVhEPx4je85_RcUZCpxrjHiiDKsKdPJE-kWZrLfpyILa17OKJ0HBrnNo9V0xjSMQNlHT7aT/4qp/wkn3i8krQ1mzCjUZ3jW1VA/h0/h001.gDYkJXcJ9KlomfuqJKWL7HESZz7WtZim1_uEJUHBXPI)**In disclosure form after disclosure form, Roberts mischaracterized more than $20 million of household income from high-powered law firms. He concealed his wife’s equity stake and failed to recuse himself in over 500 relevant cases. **And he’s going to get away with all of it, unless Congress steps in and does its job.** **That’s because the Supreme Court has no real code of ethics.** The paper-thin code Roberts himself designed is completely unenforceable. You could drive a luxury RV through the holes it creates. **Chief Justice Roberts—and the Supreme Court as a whole—can’t be trusted to police themselves. It’s up to Congress to perform its constitutional duty as a check and balance. Soon, they’ll have a chance to demand accountability from the justices face-to-face at a Senate hearing.** **[Send a message to your members of Congress right now. Tell them enough is enough. Demand accountability from Chief Justice Roberts and any other corrupt justice on the Court during the justices’ upcoming appearance before Congress.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxMPguUoPI5DybRHO6PWVxY2POXfIE8sKpLl68fpE0vwil-HUxZxKp7qWICpXTa6_D1wXpbKbgXutUWg-W0PH0SlWe7AqekVocvigC_DEj1etpB4BpB7d8EXpd5b7uGt5V3wRHBCgyC1wfsR7o-UxZxmxSxPf0y0bBC0WX_5CkPJ8j2cN6a_XqeVD0UhTM2mGlIiz1fejt_W50r004ZN3GG0FONw4uM3FhUNKAI6usNUfZBm0dZGQ3TMGaGlB0r54SnD3LUXG-hmcVl1YRSv9ljS-wKoTye5aVjx3A7X1ReIXTDIfWaOpvSwLIbGeLx9Ac/4qp/wkn3i8krQ1mzCjUZ3jW1VA/h1/h001.LK55wOTnRkqEj5dU_fABsOUuyG4ZyHAOVVMUz1MfOsg)** [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxMPguUoPI5DybRHO6PWVxY2POXfIE8sKpLl68fpE0vwil-HUxZxKp7qWICpXTa6_D1wXpbKbgXutUWg-W0PH0SlWe7AqekVocvigC_DEj1etpB4BpB7d8EXpd5b7uGt5VK-HsR70eB04K6qU5brhVDht7uD7QusDYvqkPFJLzIbS4m_PmM1Oad2ZB0HXWRJA7Lzs5yAGBZlMAFepkKLTK8a0dm4xbcALIIIs2oNZDKUhBYmlWy2R8JD4cegv8HUFIv3bVBVC8cTZADSnPCvCRimzCwn95EkR1e07safyNje362wFUuKDwtsqgANu1zO4i/4qp/wkn3i8krQ1mzCjUZ3jW1VA/h2/h001.O43NK8RptdazLTbWPSkfygI5fBLUV_tt_JBSHiQUvTw) By all appearances, Jane Roberts made a career switch in order to take advantage of her husband’s position. She worked with elite law firms and corporations who were likely to appear before the Supreme Court, essentially forcing them to curry favor with her family. The Roberts’ Court believe the rules that apply to every other federal judge don’t apply to them. And they’re right—because they wrote the rules. That’s why Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito were able to accept free trips and gifts from billionaire benefactors with no consequences. It’s why the MAGA justices can fail to recuse themselves in cases they’re personally attached to. **Our democracy has been poisoned by a packed Supreme Court that allows justices to line their own pockets and do the bidding of their benefactors. United for Democracy is fighting back—we’re rallying with organizations across issue areas, activists, experts, and creators.** We’re going to be here every step of the way to keep a spotlight directly on the corrupt Supreme Court. It’s going to take forcing Congress to listen to the voice of the people, not wealthy MAGA elites. If we want Supreme Court justices to be accountable to the people, we need Congress to have a backbone and do its job. **[Tell Congress: No business as usual. Demand accountability and answers from corrupt Supreme Court justices now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxMPguUoPI5DybRHO6PWVxY2POXfIE8sKpLl68fpE0vwil-HUxZxKp7qWICpXTa6_D1wXpbKbgXutUWg-W0PH0SlWe7AqekVocvigC_DEj1etpB4BpB7d8EXpd5b7uGt5V-Qzq_AMF8dO8xV-G0sDxT8FrkQ9tPLzNvIIQB64XgFUV7nf05HhmaMXmGmsHA7P6mjSA2vLC1l_mTaE_l67YFNG7f2er2CE5__kAO1No0NWCgyjz9bWrg7oI7DGJoELUyRr2yf6mI72vg_esJlisQKDtnrxxD-ni8W5fsiuXItpYI-OKU1Ie9hBA2nmY_6k8/4qp/wkn3i8krQ1mzCjUZ3jW1VA/h3/h001.tqIzXFTlALm92obnD3zV5WOKyX2SA99WJc5nkNYiY-U)** Thank you for fighting for accountability, Morgan Stahr

clean_body: The Chief Justice’s wife made $10,323,842 from firms her husband ruled on. | | Peter, Whistleblower spreadsheets have revealed that Chief Justice John Roberts’ wife Jane took over $10 MILLION in commission from the very firms her husband was ruling on from his seat on the Supreme Court.** disclosure form after disclosure form, Roberts mischaracterized more than $20 million of household income from high-powered law firms. He concealed his wife’s equity stake and failed to recuse himself in over 500 relevant cases. And he’s going to get away with all of it, unless Congress steps in and does its job. That’s because the Supreme Court has no real code of ethics. The paper-thin code Roberts himself designed is completely unenforceable. You could drive a luxury RV through the holes it creates. Chief Justice Roberts—and the Supreme Court as a whole—can’t be trusted to police themselves. It’s up to Congress to perform its constitutional duty as a check and balance. Soon, they’ll have a chance to demand accountability from the justices face-to-face at a Senate hearing. By all appearances, Jane Roberts made a career switch in order to take advantage of her husband’s position. She worked with elite law firms and corporations who were likely to appear before the Supreme Court, essentially forcing them to curry favor with her family. The Roberts’ Court believe the rules that apply to every other federal judge don’t apply to them. And they’re right—because they wrote the rules. That’s why Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito were able to accept free trips and gifts from billionaire benefactors with no consequences. It’s why the MAGA justices can fail to recuse themselves in cases they’re personally attached to. Our democracy has been poisoned by a packed Supreme Court that allows justices to line their own pockets and do the bidding of their benefactors. United for Democracy is fighting back—we’re rallying with organizations across issue areas, activists, experts, and creators. We’re going to be here every step of the way to keep a spotlight directly on the corrupt Supreme Court. It’s going to take forcing Congress to listen to the voice of the people, not wealthy MAGA elites. If we want Supreme Court justices to be accountable to the people, we need Congress to have a backbone and do its job. ** Thank you for fighting for accountability, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . Trump is already preparing to lock down another Supreme Court seat before
a vacancy is even announced.

He’s got the shortlist, the dark money machine, and the MAGA movement
ready to ram through a fourth loyalist the second an opening happens.

before he can steamroll another nominee onto the bench for life.

nightmare for Trump and his Republican cronies from day one.

body:
| | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2grIy5OK_Hz_rGVIh5dOJbAYm3jH7PsLD0eXCyL7ht7r8wAqYmPS4NvuloSBg1oZBPbLAwh9SblVWiTw3ukTQb8hu8JQZv6syaw2KNdFBTr79a0RKFuosBZPkmeUHRlhOTfBJjyBR9-jpwZepFMAq7qb7grlsA1twBWbyzu0MDbfShkL8EIZHVBLc19-Wl1A_fR68sUqu-Ra5pivjSZx7mSn7qgGYeYCQJgaGEtw7UTMSmW_1xqXGslf1anJ43GpisRmfRdkCxu_i_egpDYW0fpnnLc_Km_LJ9RdQhG4VApO3pR4Pt9JFCfDqp6mPOiK1Mvq8jL13awF5zsuWF3Kgbs/4qp/y2OcJNE2QZi61bLTT5kAtA/h0/h001.EJ1HnQDEJgIGmX62KXXQP5_616jMGnjuXvlvTfoNEUo)
---
You may have heard that the Sacramento Bee endorsed our campaign. Read what they said, and then **[contribute $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2rOFUD6VYNCeur32PqkTfR2M0jzD65Fp3o6d5lGj0qrdww7jVgbNXzK9HkKOvEw5U4OhHz5vCrQq_m3RLYzBpVB2NN7XTgMnNYsgks56IwehfI7W8tHnyl6m15y2yAzJc0Gaar0coHnqQjWnNCgesf7Po9EwOMkmtdHvuXMBzT_b9GsfmREWZE3Bt7Ln2z_ablXHnCPC7HsCgJV-1DuzwMuPtje2ciVhoeFFXlYITob6ZrN0nHdvyv5uX5Owfxwe7lIuuS_dA5yniRXAK_ZFUfxr49XVM3knLqlJB4tVxHleJO_nB1cX5vifut965SL6hd-V1pPqxA_NjX0rrpFcJR_SE33bRYYM2pQgJWYuRBga/4qp/y2OcJNE2QZi61bLTT5kAtA/h1/h001.51D5WKTroCYzxRY9OFhJszJxDIBsOPU_1WsnHFrNWPw)** to help us make the most of this moment before June 2nd.

First, the headline:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2rOFUD6VYNCeur32PqkTfR2M0jzD65Fp3o6d5lGj0qrdww7jVgbNXzK9HkKOvEw5UzMteraHRCIGNekk_-FstNTEvBMJjg6nldc6aD_n8vdkajNVmUU8pAVzjqORJD7QOdKqyrF5biqQzF_Wu2H4jfAWhAJkpv3jY-w19ZT46Uizk0t2oUUINyirTAAMZa6oDPEzt3BlW9yJlw2GJgcJ3N0RKjw_47zVQVcQwshrOR0dm7od_D7B6wFzpt4LDhb7aulLoA_LSbcfAq66bT2vyYYx2ME1Aednw8--PubLVJHHjHQjrfQnffpEZRxb5vEpWzY6NSFdBEK_9r15MzI9okKxfouBbjFpHCCiOQiBg1lQ/4qp/y2OcJNE2QZi61bLTT5kAtA/h2/h001.iGWOtNzHH4Qx9QseK77L_xN4TnxU-Y0Ns-xOv71vJt0)
But here's what you may have missed: Doris Matsui didn't just lose the Bee's endorsement – _she disqualified herself from it._

The Bee requested that Matsui meet with Mai and the editorial board together. She refused. In 20 years in Congress, facing her first serious challenger, she wouldn't sit in the same room with us. **The Bee called it "sadly a reflection of how two remarkable women who began their lives in similar ways have evolved so differently."**

This is the same Congresswoman who held a scripted virtual town hall in 2024 where -- and this is a direct quote from the Bee -- "it was clear that both the questions and answers were scripted in advance. Matsui's eyes moved from left to right as she read the prepared responses."

Meanwhile, here's what the Bee said about Mai:

**"Vang is truly a people's candidate. She has been a tireless advocate for her council district, seemingly everywhere and never afraid to engage a constituent in a discussion."**

This is what a real choice looks like. Someone who shows up vs. someone who hides behind scripts and corporate donors.

clean_body: | | | | You may have heard that the Sacramento Bee endorsed our campaign. Read what they said, and then to help us make the most of this moment before June 2nd. First, the headline: But here's what you may have missed: Doris Matsui didn't just lose the Bee's endorsement – she disqualified herself from it. The Bee requested that Matsui meet with Mai and the editorial board together. She refused. In 20 years in Congress, facing her first serious challenger, she wouldn't sit in the same room with us. The Bee called it "sadly a reflection of how two remarkable women who began their lives in similar ways have evolved so differently." This is the same Congresswoman who held a scripted virtual town hall in 2024 where -- and this is a direct quote from the Bee -- "it was clear that both the questions and answers were scripted in advance. Matsui's eyes moved from left to right as she read the prepared responses." Meanwhile, here's what the Bee said about Mai: "Vang is truly a people's candidate. She has been a tireless advocate for her council district, seemingly everywhere and never afraid to engage a constituent in a discussion." This is what a real choice looks like. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Republicans are obsessed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I need you standing with me.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)
I want to share what I said on the Capitol steps recently:
I didn’t have the courage to come out until I was 21.
The truth is, I had known who I was for my entire life, and that meant 21 years of pain. 21 years of a kind of homesickness that only went away when I was finally able to get the care I needed.
My biggest regret in life is that I never had a childhood without that pain.
So many years later, I marvel at the courage of transgender young people today, who are sharing themselves with their families and this world despite the toxicity and the hate that too often comes from Congress and from the politicians inside it.
All any of us want is to live a life of purpose and happiness and wholeness, and I carry that with me every day in Congress — especially right now.
**Because Mike Johnson and House Republicans passed extreme anti-trans bills, including one that risks jailing parents and doctors for affirming transgender children and following medical best practices.**
Republican politicians have made their priorities painfully clear: all they care about is making the rich richer and attacking trans people.
As the only openly trans member of Congress, I refuse to stay silent. I will keep fighting for the dignity, humanity, and fair treatment of every person in Delaware and across the country.
**But if we’re going to tackle this Republican obsession, I need you standing with me.**
[**Rush a donation to help me keep pushing back. Every donation sends a powerful message that we won’t let Republicans get away with weaponizing trans kids as political pawns.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260517-1.Q_NKQ8&refcode=em20260517-3273&amount=5&t=2&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260517-1.Q_NKQ8&amount=5&refcode=em20260517-3273&t=21&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)**
Thank you,
—Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2026-footer?refcode=em20260517-1&t=22&refcode2=3273_21716_ooLSLn&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3273%2E21716%2EooLSLn)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Rand Paul
subject: What a whistleblower just confirmed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Fauci intentionally influenced the intelligence community's analysis of COVID origins.
_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/1IESJ6G-mk-6KPIJ9CXBN3gmedWIsRJkKNAKl61u-ZoO5NpAJgTYqkXbexza6SpDmm0zaysdi0twJg6-Fe197vt_xIZSkLF5d95W0TN2xF_wwMW0r1DpHmb4fxPkWftFDWUB85h9VsF_UktmguM9bsTOunsyRmG6v0Vk0HVRmJe12k7ifaf4V1q2/JpUSYHmMH8aYyAfHoXwc6BbQofxckkNx/20)_
---

name: Team Pou
subject: No agency is above the law
body:
It's that simple

| |
---
Friend, The issue is simple, and the policy must be too: we don't need masked agents in our communities. Across the country, we've seen ICE agents operating in communities with no visible badges, no identifying information, and no accountability. They've acted lawlessly and failed to guarantee the due process rights of citizens. When agents hide their identities, communities can't hold them accountable. And the rule of law, the principle that no person and no agency is above it, gets hollowed out. Our communities deserve better. That's why Nellie won't stay silent. She's working to hold ICE accountable and calling for the law to apply to everyone, including federal agents. **[If you believe no agency is above the law, we need you with us in this fight. Chip in today to help re-elect Nellie and keep this battleground seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131576573/621585072/-200729754?refcode=260517_tp_masked_l1&amount=25&ms=260517_tp_masked&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFhNjA1MWYtMGY1Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gifueFBC5o_c_uuSQl2nfh3mCrNfD5xkaRyUaIcpLt8=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131576580/621585079/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260517_tp_masked&ms=260517_tp_masked&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFhNjA1MWYtMGY1Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gifueFBC5o_c_uuSQl2nfh3mCrNfD5xkaRyUaIcpLt8=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131576581/621585080/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260517_tp_masked&ms=260517_tp_masked&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFhNjA1MWYtMGY1Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gifueFBC5o_c_uuSQl2nfh3mCrNfD5xkaRyUaIcpLt8=)

_**by Cliff Schecter**_
There's an old Chinese proverb: "one cannot have both the fish and the bear's paw."
I always interpreted it as a reminder we cannot have all we desire in life. There are choices to be made. And if I were to update this proverb, I might add:
> One cannot have both the fish and the bear's paw...and the sense of self and cognitive ability to assess situations logically, process information objectively, filter out emotional distortions or distractions, and [not tongue-bathe a murderous dictator in Beijing like your mouth has a franchise agreement with Bath & Body Works](https://substack.com/redirect/df2639ea-45e7-4655-b255-8a5bd8243748?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/688a44a1-78bd-4fe4-ac00-96e5ea9ece27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Former Biden Ad Writer Cliff Schecter & Former Congressman Joe Walsh Sipping & Talking_
Yes, Trump's sojourn to "Jine-ah" was the main topic the illustrious Mr. Walsh and I discussed on _Tequila Talk_ this week. His sickening display of moral flaccidity was nothing new. As a 14-yr old boy, I had posters of Samantha Foxx and Tia Carrere on my wall. In 80-yr-old Trumpistan, it's Orban, Putin, gold, Dr. Doom, gold, Xi, an AR-15, Erdogan, gold, and Kim Jong-Un. The man has a fetish for gold and "strongmen." Which is another way of saying that if you've in any way successfully repressed anywhere from tens of millions to a billion of your countrymen/women [via an enormous kleptocracy](https://substack.com/redirect/cd539be3-9acc-4ad5-9c4b-070e0271e754?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), personal threat, torture, or murder, you're totally Trump's guy!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/688a44a1-78bd-4fe4-ac00-96e5ea9ece27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.XoSg_PyQtiyXPvd7WXtr29aVniNL8qxpzzXc78Vp9z4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=197749761)
* * *
This sends a thrill up Trump's leg like Rich Lowry admitted feeling when he saw Sarah Palin on the tv. You remember Lowry, professional white guy for something like 232 lunar cycles at The National Review? In any case, when Trump sees someone like Xi in person, the pucker-up to his pucker-hole makes Xi better than a Trump tax break for burying his first wife on the 14th hole. (_I-hyperbole_ --just a bit).
Trump transitions into a little boy around mass murderers who flatter him with tall tales of his many accomplishments in the arena of _being Donald Trum_ p. It's what toddler Trump always wanted as he gazed across the then cement-boot-stuffed Easter River--from his upper-middle class neighborhood in Queens (he had it rough) to the klieg lights of Manhattan. _And Donald dreamt of being a star._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/688a44a1-78bd-4fe4-ac00-96e5ea9ece27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_I knew Mary Katherine Gallagher, superstar. She was a friend of mine. And Donald you 're no Mary Katherine Gallagher_
But when the real stars find you to be a wholly untalented, repulsive, gauche, mundane, moronic, crackbrained, laughably-wretched d*ck chisel, you go all in for those who _make people love them_ by killing them if they don't. Even if these same dictators all privately think, like everyone else, you're a schmuck. And just flatter you to manipulate you so further betray your country.
Former Congress critter Joe and I also had a great conversation about the MAGA lies/attacks on one of the few Republicans to stand up to his highness, Thomas Massie. Massie's a Rep. from Northern Kentucky. We're seeing all the slimey ads here in the Cincy market. It's the exact refuse you'd expect [from the guy carrying forward the assisted suicide of the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/71ea5f65-0864-456c-ae29-4f828f42da4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of America to enrich himself and his sons Uday and Qusay.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/688a44a1-78bd-4fe4-ac00-96e5ea9ece27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_The golden ...calf injury to stay out of Vietnam_
Also, do airline pilots "bark" and "meow" to air traffic controllers at 10,000 feet? Well, if you watch, you'll find out about a few guys you may not want to fly piloting your aircraft in the future. Also, is it _social democrat_ or _democratic socialist_? I have opinions.
All of these important topics are broken down _honestly_ for you as Walsh and I discuss serious political topics (+ a fun one thrown in) with all the humor two humans can muster. While sipping some tequila _for a great conversation_!
The billionaire-owned networks call this "strategy." We call it _fighting for democracy_.

| FROM THE DESK OF THE NEW DOGE COMMITTEE CHAIRMAN RE: Nationwide DOGE Survey
---
My fellow Americans:
The deed is done - I am the new Chairman of the DOGE Committee.

[As my first order of business, I’m putting together my first-ever Nationwide DOGE Survey. And I’d be grateful to include your feedback.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=74c3d2c8120245f5b823d63568978131&_e=cgw-z2rN_9yY7UEYAheRNWzkcaO7-51VVTeNA1wcdFxG5O6ajnd27cInDk3ADpX7TEXuHojhsonliaw_2hO9I-dNwtkopog4JIFinDlagyYoSfZ0LPDp7yH-LUcnSRdv2f44aLuRAIh3Q0MIBnWRVvM84Oza0YlSjt6g8TwD1PoCKnSYNybpyBhowBXUL-xUM9ieIrV6-EpnWj1vVMDu6NBdC6xgrtQ7t4XZ9V_D1cQd8Nv4gj3B3sgqs95xure7AxiSXoL7SZAG-eSJtZaAFnhiPcw5YhXcygfIV1CqLr6Wja7z8yDIPDnVbhytdTUuQRlktTfuYK8CJfourQY8Prz03bw_O8Fm0BtKTNFg8gCDu_1XFHzC0UJnWJPP2miJANqS5m9DiQgtEd7ZrP6tHfLsDeSOFRaPl-osGK65T8fMBC3bk2mZQpgVSWC2kzTpo1x-0aXbEYKSGvHiaxrwxt19nz_T8BpDoYbVaZ-BwAAv76nkGe5pR9Xpx15-Ukb105YcufF_YfVXSFj4n9zxV2EdPPgDOO8mYVEQEZO7Q2cJ0g95km1vPWFJ4nJTjfWfX5SMXxpK2cLzvtrNjKv9BFImZiUUvGH6xoizm1zaefZL20xR6OJ6WKPsOEOu-SNqTfpklx2nSNWZePSSaFDvoWkBtF8UD0-rgs13NW6hQ97K8kXU5RSqLh2EsAjV571m86ZQ984gWpBIFK2maOwbBF4t3ndE57vkvNMvrLk1RFE%3D)
I'm sick and tired of performative politicians in Washington crowing about cutting waste but not making any headway. That's why I'm stepping up to codify President Trump's Executive Orders and gut the waste and fraud that Elon found.
I'm spittin' mad knowing that government bureaucrats are sending YOUR tax dollars overseas to fund terrorists in far-flung countries. That's about as smart as chickens running KFC!
I'm sure you read about the Somali criminals allegedly stealing billions of dollars using fraudulent daycares...
This job is too big for one man, so I'm hoping you'll partner with me. [Will you take my Nationwide DOGE Survey and help me root out any waste and fraud?](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=74c3d2c8120245f5b823d63568978131&_e=cgw-z2rN_9yY7UEYAheRNWzkcaO7-51VVTeNA1wcdFxG5O6ajnd27cInDk3ADpX7TEXuHojhsonliaw_2hO9I-dNwtkopog4JIFinDlagyYoSfZ0LPDp7yH-LUcnSRdv2f44aLuRAIh3Q0MIBnWRVvM84Oza0YlSjt6g8TwD1PoCKnSYNybpyBhowBXUL-xUM9ieIrV6-EpnWj1vVMDu6NBdC6xgrtQ7t4XZ9V_D1cQd8Nv4gj3B3sgqs95xure7M_ls1O4imhKaOgNj62ynP348KHIGUiGFxEjZTYV-XldWFmOk8gC9d87AkzAhr8R2kHQZa4bjagkW2YV0WO7sZGtTLhtJaqtIb_CppHXRxewc-RFL03cUS4lpmsA-qh6RQLC7Lw52RxnvYfPHqjWRQL63y3OMikGsX0LcGkK6XJu-bEPXpzHbyyemI0n2N8iFFwELJnrtwokxUAdzvu5wTQXZmSFUDoHDyEg1qetaDVb0lf7s4agBRHBiogrG8TTvPS0Pjxu6RT4ljFi40iYXErNZGwYQQ4BH_-TYJ7f_Xwd4thrQy3PeSOkXsMrF_t9PEDJfcofkwa7ZPdotIPTvyHwtTUraT9JsayCdWwJi-9NW0Sfp3pX1914tmG-NvAQFIFOfOKOC8ZyMzyQqGrMKDMcFF4NFe-uO_EPKBmIjO2MLTVFUxOe2qh6Fxu84iiXlcP7jsKmnBD73UDzH88TX5GYimr9DB17H7rSdxokj8bc%3D)

Tim Burchett Chairman, House DOGE Committee

# ['Thomas Massie: The Contrarian Libertarian Who Forgot His District' by Booker Scott](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=198113445&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MTEzNDQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzkwMzczMzUsImV4cCI6MTc4MTYyOTMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IiqFKZSOgwY4OBEwP_R_aJSK5csxp_U2RiwXLNefPkM)
### It is easy to be a hero on the internet when your district is the one left waiting for results.
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)

| May 17

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54d66f83-a091-40a2-a5e2-4f410b707271?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Kentucky's Fourth Congressional District deserves a representative who fights for its people, not one who performs for national applause. Congressman Thomas Massie has positioned himself as the principled libertarian holdout against big government. In reality, he has become a professional contrarian whose loudest stands benefit his national donor base and personal brand far more than the working families, manufacturers, and river communities he was elected to serve.

With a competitive primary looming on May 19 against Trump-endorsed candidate Ed Gallrein, voters in northern Kentucky should ask a simple question: What has Massie actually delivered? Massie entered Congress via a 2012 special election and has coasted to reelection with minimal opposition for over a decade.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=198113445&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MTEzNDQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzkwMzczMzUsImV4cCI6MTc4MTYyOTMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IiqFKZSOgwY4OBEwP_R_aJSK5csxp_U2RiwXLNefPkM)
His early record showed occasional pragmatism. In 2014, he cosponsored the Water Resources and Development Act, a bipartisan measure that authorized the Army Corps of Engineers to maintain 276 miles of the Ohio River. That infrastructure matters deeply to a district bordered by the river, as it supports transportation, industry, and jobs. It was the kind of tangible, district-focused work constituents expect.

Since then, the highlights have been few. Massie voted for the First Step Act in 2018, a criminal justice reform bill that passed the House 358-36 with broad support. These were consensus measures. The transformation into the lone-wolf obstructionist began in earnest during the Coronavirus pandemic.

In March 2020, as the nation faced an economic freefall due to COVID-19, Massie single-handedly forced an in-person recorded vote on the $2 trillion CARES Act. He demanded a quorum, compelling lawmakers to travel to Washington during the virus's dangerous early surge and derailing a planned voice vote that would have passed the relief swiftly.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/70a3d6df-fd4b-4dfe-a060-ff9c4ceaf84d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.L-Ymvh9VjL2F0RBGHVvHJxka0Em5yl3r5HADnRIOoag?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=198113445)
The move earned him immediate bipartisan condemnation for prioritizing theatrical purity over practical governance and public health guidance. Nothing substantive changed in the legislation. The bill passed overwhelmingly anyway. What did change was Massie's profile. Overnight, the previously obscure congressman became a hero to libertarian activists nationwide.

His campaign raised more than $200,000 in days--much of it from outside Kentucky. The pattern was set: national notoriety funded by distant donors, local needs sidelined. That trend has only accelerated. As Massie's opposition to President Trump and GOP leadership sharpened, so did his fundraising. Massie enjoyed the limelight and he began to walk away from those who voted for him.
In 2025, he posted his best quarter fundraising in 13 years, hauling in over $700,000. By April 2026, he held $1.7 million in cash on hand. During the heated primary fight this spring, Massie launched a "moneybomb" that brought in $1.2 million in a single week. Strikingly, 68% of recent donations came from first-time contributors--largely national libertarians drawn to his image as the uncompromising outsider.

Local voters and national donors are not the same constituency. One group lives with the consequences of his votes; the other enjoys the spectacle from afar and moves on to the next cause. This funding model reveals the deeper problem. Thomas Massie no longer primarily represents the people of northern Kentucky. He represents a small but vocal network of contrarian libertarians scattered across the country who reward performative obstruction.

While his district grapples with real issues--manufacturing competitiveness, river infrastructure, opioid recovery, and trade policy--Massie has built a brand around voting "no" and issuing statements.

The grand constitutional stands generate clicks, donations, and Super PAC war chests that he can retain even if defeated. Constituents get the Instagram libertarian, not the results-oriented legislator.

The Libertarian Party itself offers a cautionary tale here. After fifty years of organized effort, it commands roughly 2% national support. Most Americans harbor libertarian instincts--skepticism of overreach, respect for individual rights--but they also understand that effective governance requires occasional compromise and focus on local priorities.

Massie's brand of showy isolationism squanders that potential. It turns principle into parody.

Predictive markets currently give Massie roughly a 70% chance of surviving the May 19 primary, with polls show a 5% race with 13% of likely voters still undecided.

A close contest would send a powerful message. Northern Kentucky deserves a congressman who treats the district as his primary client, not a stage for national performance art. Ed Gallrein, backed by Trump and focused on delivering results over rhetoric, offers that alternative.

Voters should look past the carefully cultivated image of the _lone defender of the Constitution_. Thomas Massie's record shows a man who learned how to monetize contrarianism while his district waited for consistent, effective representation.

On May 19, Kentucky's Fourth can choose substance over spectacle. The people of northern Kentucky have earned better than a congressman whose biggest victories come in fundraising emails and Twitter threads. They deserve a fighter who actually delivers results for them. Not one who forgot them.
Vote and vote wisely.

Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer

clean_body: It is easy to be a hero on the internet when your district is the one left waiting for results. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? It is easy to be a hero on the internet when your district is the one left waiting for results. | | | May 17 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Kentucky's Fourth Congressional District deserves a representative who fights for its people, not one who performs for national applause. Congressman Thomas Massie has positioned himself as the principled libertarian holdout against big government. In reality, he has become a professional contrarian whose loudest stands benefit his national donor base and personal brand far more than the working families, manufacturers, and river communities he was elected to serve. With a competitive primary looming on May 19 against Trump-endorsed candidate Ed Gallrein, voters in northern Kentucky should ask a simple question: What has Massie actually delivered? Massie entered Congress via a 2012 special election and has coasted to reelection with minimal opposition for over a decade. His early record showed occasional pragmatism. In 2014, he cosponsored the Water Resources and Development Act, a bipartisan measure that authorized the Army Corps of Engineers to maintain 276 miles of the Ohio River. That infrastructure matters deeply to a district bordered by the river, as it supports transportation, industry, and jobs. It was the kind of tangible, district-focused work constituents expect. Since then, the highlights have been few. Massie voted for the First Step Act in 2018, a criminal justice reform bill that passed the House 358-36 with broad support. These were consensus measures. The transformation into the lone-wolf obstructionist began in earnest during the Coronavirus pandemic. In March 2020, as the nation faced an economic freefall due to COVID-19, Massie single-handedly forced an in-person recorded vote on the $2 trillion CARES Act. He demanded a quorum, compelling lawmakers to travel to Washington during the virus's dangerous early surge and derailing a planned voice vote that would have passed the relief swiftly. | | ---|---|--- The move earned him immediate bipartisan condemnation for prioritizing theatrical purity over practical governance and public health guidance. Nothing substantive changed in the legislation. The bill passed overwhelmingly anyway. What did change was Massie's profile. Overnight, the previously obscure congressman became a hero to libertarian activists nationwide. His campaign raised more than $200,000 in days--much of it from outside Kentucky. The pattern was set: national notoriety funded by distant donors, local needs sidelined. That trend has only accelerated. As Massie's opposition to President Trump and GOP leadership sharpened, so did his fundraising. Massie enjoyed the limelight and he began to walk away from those who voted for him. In 2025, he posted his best quarter fundraising in 13 years, hauling in over $700,000. By April 2026, he held $1.7 million in cash on hand. During the heated primary fight this spring, Massie launched a "moneybomb" that brought in $1.2 million in a single week. Strikingly, 68% of recent donations came from first-time contributors--largely national libertarians drawn to his image as the uncompromising outsider. Local voters and national donors are not the same constituency. One group lives with the consequences of his votes; the other enjoys the spectacle from afar and moves on to the next cause. This funding model reveals the deeper problem. Thomas Massie no longer primarily represents the people of northern Kentucky. He represents a small but vocal network of contrarian libertarians scattered across the country who reward performative obstruction. While his district grapples with real issues--manufacturing competitiveness, river infrastructure, opioid recovery, and trade policy--Massie has built a brand around voting "no" and issuing statements. The grand constitutional stands generate clicks, donations, and Super PAC war chests that he can retain even if defeated. Constituents get the Instagram libertarian, not the results-oriented legislator. The Libertarian Party itself offers a cautionary tale here. After fifty years of organized effort, it commands roughly 2% national support. Most Americans harbor libertarian instincts--skepticism of overreach, respect for individual rights--but they also understand that effective governance requires occasional compromise and focus on local priorities. Massie's brand of showy isolationism squanders that potential. It turns principle into parody. Predictive markets currently give Massie roughly a 70% chance of surviving the May 19 primary, with polls show a 5% race with 13% of likely voters still undecided. A close contest would send a powerful message. Northern Kentucky deserves a congressman who treats the district as his primary client, not a stage for national performance art. Ed Gallrein, backed by Trump and focused on delivering results over rhetoric, offers that alternative. Voters should look past the carefully cultivated image of the lone defender of the Constitution. Thomas Massie's record shows a man who learned how to monetize contrarianism while his district waited for consistent, effective representation. On May 19, Kentucky's Fourth can choose substance over spectacle. The people of northern Kentucky have earned better than a congressman whose biggest victories come in fundraising emails and Twitter threads. They deserve a fighter who actually delivers results for them. Not one who forgot them. Vote and vote wisely. Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer Thanks for reading! This post is public so feel free to share it. This Substack is reader-supported. name: Katie Porter
subject: Tom Steyer’s staggering $193 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I need your help in my biggest fight yet.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41367%2E3422442%2EAgm1Rz)
Peter, there’s been a major development in our race.
My billionaire opponent, Tom Steyer, poured **another $13.5 million** into his campaign, **bringing his total self-funding up to a staggering $193 million.**
We knew more spending was coming, but we weren’t expecting anything close to this.
If we don’t have the resources to respond, Steyer could completely drown us out across California in these final weeks.
**[So I have to ask: can you rush a $5 donation to our campaign to help us fight back against this billionaire ASAP?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260517_1_ak.HGgdrw&refcode=em20260517-41367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41367%2E3422442%2EAgm1Rz)**
I’ll be honest: _this level of spending could change the trajectory of this race._
Instead of winning support with good ideas, he’s trying to buy this election outright.
I don’t think billionaires should be able to use their wealth to gain political power and influence our democracy, and I’m not backing down now.
I’ve spent my career standing up to people like Tom Steyer trying to cheat the system. But this is one of the biggest fights we’ve faced yet, and I can’t do it alone.
**[Our campaign is counting on Porter Supporters like you to step up, Peter. Can you donate $5 or whatever you can to help win in the final stretch of this campaign?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260517_1_ak.HGgdrw&refcode=em20260517-41367&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41367%2E3422442%2EAgm1Rz)**

Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260517-41367&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41367_3422442_Agm1Rz&akid=41367%2E3422442%2EAgm1Rz)**
